name: When Moonlight Shines in the Forest
description: Following the events of the Dim Forest, Qiaomu and Hoohoo decided to stay around the Violet Banyan. They seem particularly interested in the moons of the Violet Banyan.

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Cat's Language
description: A strange researcher is trying to talk to cats through a special function of her Terminal...

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Rabbit's Language
description: You meet Xuanyin again. This time, she is spying on a Green Rabbit...

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Dog's Language
description: You meet Xuanyin again, who is having fun with some puppies...

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Fish's Language
description: You meet Xuanyin again. This time, she is spying on the Tetra...

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Frog's Language
description: You meet Xuanyin again, while the sounds of frog surround you...

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Lizard's Language
description: You meet Xuanyin again, who was buried in thoughts...

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Bird's Language
description: You meet Xuanyin again. This time, she is trying to talk to a Gray Crested Gull...

name: Listen to Animals' Words: Translation of Bird's Language - Sequel
description: You meet Xuanyin again. This time, she is observing the doves on the rooftop...

name: Journal of Jinzhou: Vo.1
description: You see two engaging in a heated discussion on the journal. Go and check what has happened.

name: Journal of Jinzhou: Vol.2
description: The upcoming issue of the journal is in progress. Go and check out the featured content.

name: Overdash Guide Quest
description: Event Quest, Overdash Guide

name: Wild Heart's Return
description: In Jinzhou, you meet an unusual... human?

name: Under the Moonlit Banyan
description: You learned from Lingyang about the story of a Jingle Beast. It is said that they once lived in the vicinity of the Violet Banyan in Dim Forest. Why not go and take a look?

name: Get Ready! Let's Overdash!
description: Shui in the residential area is recruiting new members for the Overdash Club. It seems that one with a lightning overdash speed can earn rich rewards.

name: Farewell! Let's Overdash!
description: Shui is excited to learn that you have completed setting up all the tracks for the Overdash Club. Will new track challenges await?

name: Riverside Games
description: You have received an invitation letter from Wenshu. It mentions that the"Jinzhou Riverside Games" will be held soon. Go to the coordinates enclosed in the letter and have a look.

name: Stygian Lacrimosa
description: A shroud of mist and gloom envelops the mire, concealing the untold tales of the past. A mournful melody lingers in the air, offering condolences to lives that have long journeyed to the next world.

name: When the Forest is No Longer Dim
description: The Dim Forest survey team has sent an urgent distress signal, requesting your assistance with a pressing issue.
chapterName: When the Forest is No Longer Dim

name: Honorary Chef: Taste of Memories
description: You see Panhua comforting a crying girl. Maybe go up and ask what happened...

name: communication optimization test
description: communication optimization test

name: Solitary Path
description: A cryptic message reveals the Séance Society's involvement in Jinzhou's disappearances. Is this the key to unlocking the truth?

name: Restart the radar
description: The Jinzhou military wants to restart the radar at Desorock Highland, but the engineer in charge has yet to show up...

name: Photos of Jinzhou
description: You find a crowd in a peculiar corner of Jinzhou. Why not go and check it out?

name: Wait for Godo
description: Take Midnight Rangers Godo's place on guard duty

name: The Past is the Future: Introduction
description: The girl behind the theater seems to have trouble looking for the gift her sister left her. Go and learn about the situation.

name: The Past is the Future: Continued
description: Shixia invited you to join her in climbing West Mountain. Reach the mountaintop before dawn.

name: Silver-haired Echo Trainer - I
description: Why does Grandpa Jingzhu insist on capturing Echoes? Go meet up with Chixia and help Grandpa Jingzhu together.

name: Grand Warstorm
description: As the promised raindrops fall upstream, you embark on a journey north to the battlefield in search of answers.

name: Rewinding Raindrops
description: The previous puzzle's answer has been revealed, but it only leads to another one. With a storm on the horizon, you follow the Magistrate's advice and search for clues about "the Black Shores".

name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - I
description: The nagging engineer Mizhi always mentions hearing a mysterious sound calling him...

name: Tacet Discord Hunter
description: Find the Resonator who once proclaimed to be "Tacet Discord Hunter" to obtain the precious TD Material.

name: Silver-haired Echo Trainer - II
description: Grandpa Jingzhu has come up with a new method to train Echoes. Go and ask him about the details.

name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - II
description: Mizhi has gone missing, and someone has tampered with the Mechanics. Qingshu, Mizhi's senior, is very worried.

name: The Fabled Magnetic Cube Mechanics - III
description: Mizhi has come to his senses. What exactly did he encounter in the abandoned mine, and did he manage to find the ultimate Mechanics he had been pursuing?

name: Misfortune on a Workday
description: Constant cries for help persist from the Exiles camp. Defeat the Exiles and rescue the caller from the camp.

name: Lost Ranger
description: Mrs. Jué is worried about Guhong, who regularly visits the elderly but hasn't shown up for a few days. Help her find him.

name: We Promise, We Deliver
description: A mysterious Tacet Discord has appeared. Forces are needed at Port City of Guixu to defeat it.

name: Replica of Past Days
description: The Jinzhou Riverside Games will be suspended because of an anomalous emergency. You and Jiyan decide to go to the source of anomaly to find out...

name: Pastures Like Old Times
description: After resolving the crisis of TD outbreak, you and Jiyan returned to Jinzhou...

name: De-Hoochief
description: You encountered an anxious researcher, who requests your help to fight off the Hoochiefs.

name: A Quest of Wits - I
description: You meet a strange dual in the Dim Forest. They seem to have peculiar questions for you. Answer their questions correctly, and you might receive some rewards.

name: A Quest of Wits - II
description: You meet a strange dual in the Dim Forest. They seem to have peculiar questions for you. Answer their questions correctly, and you might receive some rewards.

name: A Quest of Wits - III
description: You meet a strange dual in the Dim Forest. They seem to have peculiar questions for you. Answer their questions correctly, and you might receive some rewards.

name: Camp Raid
description: Outrider Cunren is recruiting new members for a plan to raid the observation camp at the mountaintop in the Gorges of Spirits. However, it seems that the Outriders were only assigned a reconnaissance mission. Why is Cunren acting on his own?

name: Silver-haired Echo Trainer - III
description: Grandpa Jingzhu finally reveals the ultimate secret to training Echoes...! Will he finally get what he wants this time?

name: Investigate the Theft of Camp Supplies
description: Find out the whereabouts of the camp supplies

name: The Past is the Future: Epilogue
description: Head to the back of theater and accept the gift Shixia has prepared for you.

name: The Eternal Concert
description: Rumors of sounds of a piano echoing in the rain seems to have attracted many curious visitors. Go investigate around the abandoned theater and find out the truth about this strange phenomenon.

name: Save the World? Save the Cat!
description: The cat of the restaurant owner Xiaoju has not returned. Please help find the naughty cat and bring it back to its owner.

name: Messenger
description: Patroller Chuyi in the Dim Forest would like your help delivering a letter.

name: Shooting Party
description: You've received an invitation to a peculiar shooting party, seemingly related to the damaged robot in Settle Range. Go check it out.

name: Secret Investigation
description: The Patrollers near the Fireflies Sea seems to be in trouble. Learn about the situation before things get serious.

name: No Response Tonight
description: You've picked up a recording. The wind is howling in your ears, carrying the whispers. Perhaps, the robot nearby holds the key to unravel the continuation of the story.

name: Grand Warstorm
description: As the promised raindrops fall upstream, you embark on a journey north to the battlefield in search of answers.

name: Hidden Dangers in Peaceful Life
description: Xiaoyu from the Ministry of Development is in trouble. Go ask her about what happened.

name: Shadows of the Past
description: Xiaoyu wants to continue the previous topic

name: Utterance of Marvels: I
description: Amidst a ripple of Reverberations, you hear the call... As you unravel your past, a new path unfolds before you, beckoning from the unknown.

name: Utterance of Marvels: II
description: Amidst a ripple of Reverberations, you hear the call... As you unravel your past, a new path unfolds before you, beckoning from the unknown.

name: First Resonance
description: As the city lights twinkle, friendly faces beckon you to join them in the bustling border town. Immerse yourself in its prosperous yet tranquil ambiance.

name: Echoing Marche
description: As the tides of danger retreat, Jinzhou appears tranquil and vibrant. But beyond its borders lies a fierce and desperate battleground.

name: Ominous Star
description: Forbidden memories of the past lay buried in ashes and ruins. The ominous "fractured star" beckons, holding untold secrets within its shadows. Secrets that still burn within a cindered heart.

name: Clashing Blades
description: You have discovered the three tokens' purpose and directions, but the answers to their riddles are hidden behind a mysterious entrance, which you found with help from the Sundial's hints.

name: A True Arena Champion
description: You encountered an Exile attacked by Tacet Discords. After witnessing your capabilities, he seeks for you aid.

name: First Encounter with Yihu
description: The Teahouse waiter is seeking customers at the entrance.

name: Crosstalk
description: See Yihu again

name: Tacit Partnership
description: Work with Yihu

name: Later in the Story
description: See what comes after the stand-up show

name: Stand-up Show
description: Work with Yihu

name: Undercover Actor
description: You received a message. Talk to Langsheng.

name: Undercover Message
description: Find Yihu and convey the message

name: Langsheng's Request
description: Langsheng has a favor to ask

name: Explosive Spear Tip Testing Challenge
description: Someone seems to be interested in the spear tip testing held in Forsaken Home. Go check it out!

name: A Free Meal?
description: Defeat Tacet Discords for rewards? Talk about a real free meal! Join Patroller Minghu, apply and secure your spot!

name: Remnants of the Past Days
description: You've collected some "Sonance Caskets". It seems to fall in the interest of the local Relic Merchant Chenpi.

name: Time to Study
description: Jiu is supposed to be at the academy, but he appears troubled by something. Check out what happened to him.

name: Alone in the Abyss
description: You receive an urgent message from Huaxu Academy for emergency support. Head to the designated location for more information.

name: Somnoire: Illusive Realms
description:
A strange frequency has led you to Whining Aix's Mire. A mysterious "Gate" stands here, spelling a secret revelation of the past.
<color=red>(Note: the story plot takes place after the story of Somnium Labyrinth. For best experience, please participate in the event first.)</color>

description: You find another stray cat. Please rescue it and bring it to Xiaoju.

description: You find another stray cat. Please rescue it and bring it to Xiaoju.

name: Save the World? Save the Cat!
description: The Kitty Rescue Team encountered difficulties during the process of rescuing cats. Please help the team and bring the stray cat to Xiaoju.

name: Danger! Explosive!
description: On the hillside, Exile Yongli is surrounded by Explosive Charges. You detonated all of the charges out of impulse. Go listen to what he has to say.

name: Save the World? Save the Cat!
description: You find another stray cat. Please rescue it and bring it to Xiaoju.

name: Save the World? Save the Cat!
description: The Cat's favorite Noctemint is out of stock. Please bring some to Xiaoju.

name: Save the World? Save the Cat!
description: The Cat's food stock is running low. Please help feed the cat.

name: Save the World? Save the Cat!
description: You've rescued many stray cats. Please go to Xiaoju's Restaurant to see how they are doing.

name: First Trial
description: You receive a Pioneer Association Leaflet in your mailbox. Go to Jinzhou Branch and ask Maqi what has happened.

name: Pedestal Device
description: Some strange pedestals in the wild pique Researcher Qinggong's interest and he wants your help over this issue.

name: Defeat the Exiles
description: A handful of Exiles are roaming around the wild. Go and defeat them.

name: Defeat the Exiles
description: A group of Exiles was suddenly found. Go and defeat them.

name: Defeat the Exiles
description: Some Exiles showed up in the wild again. Go and defeat them.

name: Defeat the TDs
description: Tacet Discords have shown up on a key access. Eliminate them and secure the access.

name: Defeat the TDs
description: Powerful TDs have been spotted in the wild. Go and eliminate them to maintain peace.

name: Defeat the TDs
description: TDs of unknown source suddenly showed up. Eliminate them and quiet down the disorder.

name: Defeat the TDs
description: Tacet Discords are found in the wild taking the camouflage of natural creatures. Go and eliminate them.

name: Defeat the TDs
description: Tacet Discords are found in the outskirts despite blending themselves with terrain. Eliminate them before they do any damage.

name: Defeat the TDs
description: Tacet Discords are found in the wild mimicking creatures. Go and eliminate them.

name: Defeat the TDs
description: Tacet Discords have reappeared in the wild, imitating creatures. Go and eliminate them.

name: Repair the Lighthouse at the Wuming Bay
description: The lighthouse at the Wuming Bay has lost power. Try to restore its power!

name: Repair the lighthouse in Desorock Highland
description: Tacet Discords threaten the engineer on her way to the lighthouse. Provide her with escort.

name: Lost History
description: Locate five lighthouses in Huanglong, collect information, and help the historian to uncover the truth

name: Monuments of Condolence
description: The old man looking at the cemetery from a distance hopes to pay tribute with the flowers he holds to his past comrades. Please help him fulfill his wishes.

name: Hero of the Leap
description: Owing to Dashbon's great efforts, you learned of the legends of the Hero of the Leap. Follow his guidance and conquer the Overdash challenge and claim the title of Overdash Master!

name: Third-rate Painter
description: A neglected street painter is seeking help. Go and see for yourself.

name: Third-rate Painter
description: The painter begs that you help him solicit customers. Work together to push forward the plan.

name: Third-rate Painter
description: The worried painter has lost his former vigor. Ask him why and offer your help.

name: Third-rate Painter
description: The circumstances of the painter have been greatly changed. Go and see what happened.

name: Third-rate Painter
description: Now successful, the painter doesn’t have any more time. He asks for you to submit his works.

name: Specialty Drinks
description: Maqi is trying to contact you, and it appears to be related to the Pioneer Association's ambitious project, "Second Coming of Solaris"...

description: Maqi is trying to contact you, and it appears to be related to the Pioneer Association's ambitious project, "Second Coming of Solaris"...

name: A Taste of Everything
description: Though the promise of sharing a meal has yet to be fulfilled, now could be an opportune moment to catch up with her. If you have no other pressing matters, why not arrange a meeting in Jinzhou?

name: Dreamweaver's Ascent
description: Your forgotten past, hazy memories, and a strange dream... So many questions linger about your identity, and who you used to be. Meanwhile, a mysterious pull guides you to a hidden place on the distant sea...

name: Second Coming of Solaris
description: Maqi is trying to contact you, and it appears to be related to the Pioneer Association's ambitious project The Second Coming of Solaris...

name: Immortal Blaze
description: You meet an old storyteller when you roam about in Hongzhen. While you listen to the the immortality tales about Mt. Firmament, you notice another interested listener...

name: Vigil of Endless Night
description: You obtained a strange object from Chenpi, who implied it was a key to a long-forgotten secret.

name: Glorious Loong's Pearl
description: Stranded in the wilderness, a determined young woman strives to perform a sacred rite for the Sentinel's well-being. Help her fulfill the Rite of Offering, and uphold this ancient tradition.

name: Truthseeker's Pass
description: According to Xinyi, Hongzhen's Mayor, Jinhsi has gone off to Truthseeker's Pass, or the Court of Savantae Ruins. The Cipher Key stored in the heart of Truthseeker's Pass is a precondition to opening Mianloong Chamber and the audience with Jué, the Sentinel.

name: A New Companion
description: After the battle of Norfall Barren, everything came to an end. Your friends are calling you for a meet-up with snacks at Panhua's Restaurant. It seems they like to know more about that "little one" from within your body...

name: Alloy Smelt
description: Recently, a mysterious rift has appeared in the mine, and the ore merchant, Shilang is troubled by this matter...

name: Alloy Smelt
description: Recently, a mysterious rift has appeared in the mine, and the ore merchant, Shilang is troubled by this matter...

name: Under the Same Moonlit Sky
description:
Lingyang and Mingzhui are rehearsing lucky greetings. Go learn more.

Unlock a new Companion after completing this quest.

name: Tales of the Past and Present: Port City of Guixu
description: The Storyteller of Jinzhou Theater is collecting these torn pages. Go and deliver them to him.

name: Tales of the Past and Present: Norfall Barrens
description: The Storyteller of Jinzhou Theater is collecting these Data Chips. Go and deliver them to him.

description: The Storyteller of Jinzhou Theater is collecting these Data Chips. Go and deliver them to him.

name: To Mt. Firmament
description: Jinhsi has gone missing, and you just had an enigmatic dream.... That Wayfinder at the ferry may hold some answers to these mysteries.
test/
test/

name: Road of Pilgrimage
description: The hibernating deity silently awaits the pilgrims' arrival. To distinguish truth from lies, seek answers from this divine being.

name: The Commander of Time
description: It is the deity that commands time. It is the deity that bestows blessings. Now is your time to confront Sentinel Jué.

name: When the Snow Clears
description: Time resumes and the snow clears. Mt. Firmament emerges from its long seclusion, ready to embrace its revival.

name: From the Echoes of Destruction
description: The future is still unknown, and the past remains buried beneath the waves. After your journey across Mt. Firmament, all clues now point to a hidden island in the sea—the Black Shores. Yangyang's message hints that in the Port City of Guixu, you might find the Bloom Bearer now stationed in Jinzhou...

name: Mianloong Chamber
description: According to the Sentinel's hints, three Flare Stones must be activated, and the Flare Crests be put out to remove the chains on them that are made of special Flare Crests.

name: SOL3 Phase Ascension: Phase I
description: Your Terminal has received vague signals. Maybe the Nexus Beacon can help you decipher the information contained within.

name: SOL3 Phase Ascension: Phase II
description: Your Terminal has received similar signals again. Maybe the Nexus Beacon can help you decipher the information contained within.

name: SOL3 Phase Ascension: Phase III
description: Your Terminal has received similar signals again. Maybe the Nexus Beacon can help you decipher the information contained within.

name: Grand Warstorm
description: As the promised raindrops fall upstream, you embark on a journey north to the battlefield in search of answers.

name: True Colors
description:
On the way to the Pioneer Association for new tasks, you received a sudden call from Zhezhi, saying that she was summoned to appear at a dispute hearing...
What is the purpose of this hearing, and what's the story behind it? Caught up in a struggle of consciousness, will this artist being tried find the courage to reconnect with her emotions and talents, and continue to breathe new life into her paintings?

name: Moonlit Reunion
description: As the Moon-Chasing Festival approaches, you become aware of the "Moontree Lodge" tales under the Wishing Tree. An encounter with a strange robot links you to the mysterious wish granter at the Lodge...

name: Decode corrupted wishes: I
description: Try to solve the first wish

name: Moon Shall Be My Guest
description: You meet Xiangli Yao again under the Wishing Tree. Yet, this time you share a walk not for others' wishes but for the moon's glory and the bustling lives of people.

name: Chasing the Moon's Glory
description: Not far away from Yumyum Haven, you meet Zhezhi, who is troubled by a lack of inspiration for her paintings. Ask her about it.

name: Dance Dance Chelonian!
description: On an island in a lake around Hongzhen, a Hoartoise seems to have a conflict with other Tacet Discords... Do Tacet Discords lock horns?

name: Festival Preparations II
description: Begin the early-stage festival preparation at Taoyuan Vale

name: Festival Preparations III
description: Begin the second-stage festival preparation at Taoyuan Vale

name: Mountain Melodies
description: "Wind whistles, water purls, bird chirps, all echoed in the melodies of the past." Deliver the Windchimers you collect to Xian'ge and obtain various rewards. Collect the Windchimers scattered in Mt. Firmament and make the music play again.

name: Mountain Hunter I
description: A group of Tacet Discords has appeared near the hot spring, posing a threat to the safety of the residents of Hongzhen. Defeat them before they can form into a greater number.

name: Mountain Hunter II
description: A group of Tacet Discords are contaminating the water source leading to the waterfall. Defeat them before they can cause irreparable damage.

name: Mountain Hunter III
description: Tacet Discords have blocked the path to Mt. Firmament. Defeat them to clear the path.

name: Mountain Hunter IV
description: A group of Tacet Discords are gathering on the outskirts of Hongzhen. Defeat them before they become a threat to the town.

name: Eradicating Evil I
description: The Fractsidus has set up a camp for a strike force and intends to use it as a stepping stone for another invasion aimed at Mt. Firmament. Don't give them any chances.

name: Eradicating Evil II
description: You foiled the Fractsidus' vile plans at Mt. Firmament, but their remnant forces are still active near the ruins of Loong's Ridge. Defeat them before they can cause more harm.

name: Lollo Campaign, Start!
description: Maji, the head of operations at Lollo Logistics in Jinzhou, is seeking assistants for his new business venture. Swing by if you're interested.

name: Lollo Campaign I
description: You have a new "Lollo Hitman" order. Please fulfill it in time.

name: Lollo Campaign II
description: You have a new "Lollo Fixit" order. Please fulfill it in time.

name: Lollo Campaign III
description: You have a new "Lollo Grocery Shopping" order. Please fulfill it in time.

name: Lollo Campaign IV
description: Maji looks strange today. Ask him what happened.

name: Lollo Campaign V
description: You have a new "Lollo Petter" order. Please fulfill it in time.

name: Lollo Campaign VI
description: You have a new "Lollo Eater" order. Please fulfill it in time.

name: Lollo Campaign Finale
description: You have a new "Lollo Take-in" order. Please fulfill it in time.

name: Ace Salesman: I
description: Yongxin, a stones salesman from Jinzhou, is trying to drum up business in Hongzhen, but he's having trouble finding the opportunities he had hoped for.

name: Ace Salesman: II
description: Yongxin's first attempt ended tragically. Will a miracle arise on his second try?

name: Ace Salesman: III
description: Yongxin is trying to sell stones to researchers from the Academy. It sounds like a guaranteed success...

name: Ace Salesman: IV
description: All of Yongxin's business plans ended in failure. Could there be a turning point waiting for him?

name: Herb Expeditioner: I
description: Ancient wisdom says that everything in this world is useful in its own way. However, how could one tell the useful from the useless? Maybe, this young man named Shinong knows how...

name: Herb Expeditioner: II
description: Shinong made a mysterious discovery about Pavo Plums recorded in the Hongzhen Chronicle. For him, there is only one way to verify its validity.

name: Herb Expeditioner: III
description: Life is full of surprises and... accidents. Of course, there's no exception for Shinong.

name: Herb Expeditioner: IV
description: Shinong has been committed to collecting and rectifying the scattered medicine classics, and now, his efforts are paying off...

name: Professional Inheritance
description:
Uncle Dong has found a treasure left by an ancient person. This could prove to be a must-see of his stall, "Thus Says the Moon".

Unlock a new Companion after completing this quest.

name: A Brief Respite
description:
Jinhsi entrusts you with a letter to Sanhua. What could it possibly be about?

Unlock a new Companion after completing this quest.

name: Cause to Fight for
description:
Jiyan sends a message from his post far on the frontline, which seems to concern something important...

Unlock a new Companion after completing this quest.

name: Small Wooly, Big Adventures
description:
While in Jinzhou, you run into Encore on vacation. She extends a special invitation to you—
The adventure is about to begin! As Encore's closest friend, will you join the Wooly Warrior on this exciting journey?

name: Festival Preparations IV
description: Begin the third-stage festival preparation at Taoyuan Vale

name: Lores Beyond the Ranges
description: Two mysterious events happened in Hongzhen. Xinyi presumes there are ulterior motives behind them...

name: The Supreme Gunslinger!
description:
A challenge called "Moon Shooter" is known at the Moonlit Fair. Interesting challenges like this are meant for Chixia... and you!

Unlock a new Companion after completing this quest.

name: Encore's Steaming Adventure!
description:
Xisha asks you to make him the legendary fireworks. Seems like an easy job... maybe?

Unlock a new Companion after completing this quest.

name: Puzzle of Puzzles
description:
The Pioneer Association is offering generous prizes for "Hsin's Fortuity", among them is the surprise jackpot, and Changli manages to draw it. To make things more dramatic, the prize is a treasure map about a Court of Savantae legacy...

Unlock a new Companion after completing this quest.

name: Riddle and Reunion
description:
Riddle Twiddle is offering a limited special prize! Join Yangyang and try to win it!

Unlock a new Companion after completing this quest.

name: Kaleidoscope of Hongzhen
description: Xunjing, an editor for "Wutherium Geographic", is seeking a photographer. According to him, this is related to an existential crisis in his career...

name: Tactical Simulacra
description: Qinggong is recruiting volunteers for a research project. Talk to him to learn more.

name: Spring Adventures
description: Bing'ge has been scorched for his work recently. He needs someone who can help.

name: Scale of Past
description:
Uncle Fu says that he has a magical item.
It's said that this item is shaped like a scale and has a magical power called Chrono Trace that can make people relive moments from their past...

name: Self-moving Suitcase
description: Self-moving Suitcase. Gulan, Yanning linear behavior

name: Forking Paths Among the Stars
description: The newly planted flowers in the Greenhouse have bloomed. Go take a look.

name: Operation: Lunar Duo
description:
Enforce justice and cleanse the crimes lurking in the shadow before the Moon-Chasing Festival is around, now!

Unlock a new Companion after completing this quest.

name: Wish You Were Here
description:
Dianxiao is finally opening her Fan Drawing Stall. Go visit it.

Unlock a new Companion after completing this quest.

name: Blessed Be the Moon
description:
As the preparation for the Moonlit Fair is nearly complete, the whole venue exudes a vibe of joy. At this point, Jinhsi, the much anticipated Magistrate of Jinzhou shows up...

Unlock a new Companion after completing this quest.

name: Silent as a Falling Leaf
description: Accept Carlotta's job to mediate the "Friendly Collaboration" between The Order and the Montelli family.

name: Silent as a Falling Leaf
description: Enter the Averardo Vault and escort the collection to the depository.

name: The Last Knight
description:
In Egla Town, you hear legends of the "Night Reveries" and a "Mad Knight." You decide to investigate these stories.

<color=highlight>Hidden rewards can be found in this area.</color>

name: Silent as a Falling Leaf
description: Proceed to the vault's deepest chamber to locate the "imposter" and find a way to leave.

name: Peak of the Arch-Shaped Rock
description:
Stranded in the wilderness, a determined young woman strives to perform a sacred rite for the Sentinel's well-being. Help her fulfill the Rite of Offering, and uphold this ancient tradition. 
Go to one of the rite's locations based on information from the girl: <color=#ffd12f>North of Xuanji Ridges, at the boundary of yellow and white</color>.

name: Where the Waterfalls Meet
description:
Stranded in the wilderness, a determined young woman strives to perform a sacred rite for the Sentinel's well-being. Help her fulfill the Rite of Offering, and uphold this ancient tradition. 
Go to one of the rite's locations based on information from the girl: <color=#ffd12f>North of Xuanji Ridges, at the boundary of yellow and white</color>.

name: Among the Shoals and Islands
description:
Stranded in the wilderness, a determined young woman strives to perform a sacred rite for the Sentinel's well-being. Help her fulfill the Rite of Offering, and uphold this ancient tradition. 
Go to one of the rite's locations based on information from the girl: <color=#ffd12f>North of Xuanji Ridges, at the boundary of yellow and white</color>.

name: Boundary of Yellow and White
description:
Stranded in the wilderness, a determined young woman strives to perform a sacred rite for the Sentinel's well-being. Help her fulfill the Rite of Offering, and uphold this ancient tradition. 
Go to one of the rite's locations based on information from the girl: <color=#ffd12f>North of Xuanji Ridges, at the boundary of yellow and white</color>.

name: Glorious Loong's Pearl: The Last Rite
description: Stranded in the wilderness, a determined young woman strives to perform a sacred rite for the Sentinel's well-being. Help her fulfill the Rite of Offering, and uphold this ancient tradition.

name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part I
description: Rescue the trapped Aetherfin with KU-Key

name: Boundary of Deduction
description: At the entrance to a sealed room on the lower level, a malfunctioning robot keeps repeating fragmented instructions. Communicate with it to uncover the hidden story concealed within this room.

name: Quest of Faith
description: Ruins litter Penitent's End where the shadows of knights wander among the crumbling walls. A faint voice floats through the sea mist, guiding your way. "Seeker, follow in the footsteps of the knights from long ago. Uncover the long-buried truth." Hidden rewards can be found in this area.

name: Dark Flames in Silence
description: Continue your exploration in the Somnoire. Pursue that familiar figure and extinguish the dark flames he has ignited in your dream...

name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Part II
description: Head to the lower level and rescue the trapped Aetherfin with KU-Key

name: Trials of Old
description:
A secret letter finds its way to your hands.
It tells of a mysterious trial at Porto-Veno Castle, one with unmistakable links to the Fisalia family...

<color=highlight>Hidden rewards can be found in this area.</color>

name: Shadow of the Towers: Command Rise
description:
Itzel suggests that Liel might be in the nearby rise. So the three of you decide to venture inside to search for Liel.

<color=highlight>Hidden rewards can be found in this area.</color>

name: Skyward Voyage
description: An old captain named Davide is preparing for the last voyage of his life. But this time, his sights are set on something above the seas...

name: The Hidden Treasure of the Black Shores
description: After following the clues, you discover the room said to conceal hidden treasures. Yet, it appears to be just an ordinary room…

name: Yhoran's Tactical Trial
description:
Yhoran, a member of the Black Shores Emergency Response Team, is currently testing new strategies against Tacet Discords. Defeat the targets and meet the special challenge goals to earn extra rewards prepared by Yhoran.
"When you're prepared, the Reaper will not come."

name: Through the Sea Thou Break
description: Shorekeeper might have some clues about Abby's weakening frequencies. Return to the Black Shores to find out.

name: Do Echoids Dream of Electric Sheep?
description:
You found Cosmos, Encore's wooly companion, by a mysterious gate. Some kind of test seems to be running behind the gate and it needs your assistance.
During the test, Cosmos will provide Echoids to significantly boost Resonators' combat power.
You can complete the task with your friends.

name: Do Echoids Dream of Electric Sheep?: Epilogue
description: Do Echoids Dream of Electric Sheep?: Epilogue

name: Chasing the Moon, Here and Now
description: The Moonlit Fair has started as expected. Please maintain its popularity.

name: Lollo Campaign Rerun: Navigation
description: You cross paths with Maji once more. Fresh from the Lollo Logistics Headquarters, he appears determined to relaunch the Lollo Campaign.

name: Lollo Campaign: Navigation V
description: The Day 5 Campaign content has been updated, but a courier has encountered difficulties and is calling for help…

name: Lollo Campaign: Navigation II
description: The Day 2 Campaign content has been updated to include new maintenance and navigation features. Test out the new functions and see how they enhance your experience!

name: Solaris Weather Forecast
description: Arno, the Black Shores member, needs your help.

name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes
description: After a minor twist in the journey, Ragunna, the Land of Echoes, unfolds its grandeur, extending a grand welcome to the traveler from distant shores.

name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow
description: To understand Gilberto's part in the Echo incident, you trace his steps to the outskirts of the city. But the deeper you delve, the more elusive the truth becomes...

name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing
description: Following Carlotta's guidance, you arrive at the Pentinent's End and reunite with the Troupe. Here, another buried secret of the Order awaits discovery...

name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing
description: The long-awaited Carnevale is finally set to begin. Together with your friends, you are ready to thwart the Fractsidus' schemes during the celebration...

name: Data Overdash
description: The Black Shores' researcher is waiting for you to test out her new ideas.

name: Carnival in Slumberland
description: Descend into the depth of Somnoire, the depth of dreams. Here, chaos and noises reign. You watch the fabric of the whole place crumble before you. To the deeper dream, you go, and a faint whisper caresses your ear... In the realms of dreams, only the dream itself holds the answers we seek.

name: Amidst the Stars
description: Keeping its promise, KU-Cass reveals a piece of crucial intel: an omnipotent Resonator once existed in the Black Shores. The clues leading to their legacy are now scattered throughout the Black Shores...

name: Amidst the Stars
description: KU-Cass has provided you with numerous clues about that mysterious Resonator—some clues can be found on the surface, while others are scattered across Tethys' Deep...

name: Shadow of the Towers: Twilight Rise
description:
Exiles in Thessaleo Fells are seeking help...
Wait, there are exiles in Rinascita as well?

<color=highlight>Hidden rewards can be found in this area.</color>

name: Shadow of the Towers: Resounding Rise
description:
Exiles in Thessaleo Fells are seeking help...
Wait, there are exiles in Rinascita as well?

<color=highlight>Hidden rewards can be found in this area.</color>

name: Where Wind Returns to Celestial Realms
description: The northernmost edge of the Shores of Last Breath was said to be where Sentinel Imperator made Their last appearance. As you arrive, you find the area ravaged by relentless storms…

name: Lollo Campaign: Navigation III
description: On Day 3 of the Campaign, Lollo Navigator suffered an unexpected system crash. Maji needs your help to resolve the issue.

name: Lollo Campaign: Navigation IV
description: The Day 4 Campaign content has been updated. The map now indicates a potential threat along the route. Investigate the area and assess the danger.

name: Lollo Campaign: Navigation VI
description: Lollo Navigator is currently undergoing maintenance and needs reference information. Some of the items you've collected might help Maji resolve the issue…

name: Lollo Campaign: Navigation VII
description: As the Campaign nears its conclusion, an emergency arises. Your immediate assistance is needed to address the situation…

name: When the Night Knocks
description:
A mysterious request, a lost delivery, an opening door...

In a realm where dreams and nightmares intertwine, a massive shadow looms around you. It casts a darkness over reality, opening the doors to dreams across Jinzhou. It asks you, if beauty is fleeting and salvation is futile, why not remain in a dream...

name: Retro Game Collector
description: A small game cartridge could be a vessel of a captivating world of sounds, landscapes, lores, and inspirations... KU-Cass needs your assistance to recover the old game cartridges to listen again to the sounds of a lost past.

name: Ragunna Holiday
description: Outside Ragunna City, you run into Phoebe, who's on vacation. After the Carnevale, she decides to go on a pilgrimage to restore her peace of mind. Eager to show you Ragunna's wonders, she invites you to travel with her. Will this journey lead you to the answers you seek?

name: Lollo Campaign: Navigation I
description: The Day 1 Campaign content has been updated. Maji is ready for you to join forces and take on the new tasks.

name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow
description: The schemes of the Fractsidus are starting to unravel. Determined to seek the truth, you set forth to Averardo Vault...

name: The Garden's disappearance
description: The Garden's disappearance

name: Infinite Battle Simulation
description: In the battle at the Norfall Barrens, you successfully prevented the hatching of the Ovathrax, sparing Jinzhou from disaster. Yet, beneath the veneer of peace, the shadow of war still lingers…

name: Solaris Weather Forecast: Epilogue
description: Having finished the data collection for Arno, you receive a message from him requesting a meeting in Jinzhou.

name: Cerulean Echoes Adrift in the Winds: Epilogue
description: Learn about the Aetherfin from Shorekeeper.

name: Fairy Tale's Finale
description:
Beside a mysterious gate stands a girl who has accidentally wandered through it—Dorothy. She seeks your help to defeat the monsters lurking behind the gate.
In this challenge, you can choose "Dorothy's Companions" as Echoes to assist you in battle, which greatly enhances the combat abilities of Resonators.
You may complete this task with a friend.

name: Fairy Tale's Finale: Epilogue
description: Fairy Tale's Finale: Epilogue

name: Co-op BOSS challenge reward
description: Co-op BOSS challenge reward

name: Shadow of Glory
description: The Maiden left the tower without saying goodbye. Follow her trail to the land of glory.

name: If On a Rainy Night a Family
description: The bitter night lingers for the restless. An invitation from the Montelli family pulls you into its past, where new and old, balance and change collide. In the freest place of Ragunna, the host of the invitation awaits your arrival.
chapterName: If On a Rainy Night a Family

name: Beyond the Waves
description: Lollo Logistics has partnered with the Pioneer Association to launch a new event with generous rewards. Go to the courier truck to learn more.

name: Ragunna Sales Blitz!
description: Alannah from the Pioneer Association is looking for a reliable consultant.

name: Ragunna Sales Blitz II
description: Alannah appears to have her sights set on a key figure in Jinzhou...

name: Ragunna Sales Blitz III
description: Alannah seems to be interested in Huanglong's Terminals and Resonance Nexus...

name: Ragunna Sales Blitz IV
description: Alannah seems to be interested in Lollo Logistics vehicles

name: Ragunna Sales Blitz V
description: Hmm? Alannah isn't in town today?

name: Ragunna Sales Blitz VI
description: As the project nears its deadline, Alannah proposes one final plan...

name: Tactical Simulacra: Rerun
description: The Academy is recruiting volunteers for another experiment. Find Hongjing to learn more.

name: A Fleeting Night's Dream
description:
A mysterious letter gently lifts a corner of the veil that shrouds the nights gone by.
A faint whisper from the depths of the abyss waits for your reply.

name: When the Dawn Breaks
description:
The great battle within the dream has come to an end, but the story is far from over... A murmur from the depths of your consciousness guides you to Whining Aix's Mire, where a familiar gateway still stands...
<color=red>(This storyline is a continuation of the "Somnium Labyrinth" event. Playing it early may not offer the best experience.)</color>

name: When the Dawn Breaks: Epilogue
description: The mingling of dreams throws the delicate Somnoire into turmoil, where past desires morph into haunting echoes... Please, help free the lost souls from their nightmares, trapped at the crossroads between dream and reality...

name: When Colors Fade
description:
A vibrant painting in the wild, a landscape drained of its colors, and a mysterious, suspicious communication...
What is the true intent behind the caller? Head to Egla Town and speak with her to uncover the truth.

name: Sail Day, Captain!
description:
You find yourself caught in a gamble between Brant and the crew, and before you can protest, the title of one-day captain of the Fool's Troupe is thrust upon you.
Are you ready, Captain? Adventure awaits!

name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
description: Truths, answers, and choices lie at the heart of the Inverted Tower.

name: In the Name of Chivalry I
description: On an ordinary day, you come across a young man in danger... And so begins the tale of a knight.

name: In the Name of Chivalry II
description: As you travel, you hear a familiar voice crying for help. Go and see what's happening.

name: In the Name of Chivalry III
description: It's time to fulfill your promise to Faro. Set up a training session to get him started.

name: In the Name of Chivalry III
description: It's time to fulfill your promise to Faro. Set up a training session to get him started.

name: In the Name of Chivalry IV
description: Some TDs are roaming near the training spot you arranged with Faro. Take them out while you are there.

name: In the Name of Chivalry V
description: Faro's training session is due, but nearby TDs appear to be assaulting passersby—better check it out first.

name: In the Name of Chivalry VI
description: Lately, rumors have been spreading around Egla Town of a selfless knight helping those in need. You think you know who that is.

name: In the Name of Chivalry VII
description:
Your training with Faro has proven successful, and now stories of a living knight have echoed through Whisperwind Haven.
But now, the nearby TDs are troubling passersby. Eliminate them before they cause further harm.

name: In the Name of Chivalry VII
description:
Your training with Faro has proven successful, and now stories of a living knight have echoed through Whisperwind Haven.
But now, the nearby TDs are troubling passersby. Eliminate them before they cause further harm.

name: Set Sail! Pro Angler!
description: Sunshine, beach, ocean… and fish! Rinascita, surrounded entirely by the sea, thrives on its love for fishing. A young man named Ishmael will guide you to the Riccioli Islands, a fishing paradise like no other...

name: Dream Syndrome
description: Talk to Grandma Shirley, an Egla Town local, and the researcher Vanderkolk to unravel the veil of dreams.

name: Starry is the Night
description: The always calm Roccia reaches out to you with an urgent request. Go to the Strand and check on the banished "pilgrims."

name: Love in the Time of Fishing
description: A sailor named Starbuck has fallen into mental turmoil—rumor has it, a fish drove him to this state...

name: Where All Fish Converge
description: Here, all fish gather—and since whales are also considered "fish", then...

name: Old Man and the Whale
description: In a storm long ago, a captain and a whale sank beneath the waves together. Now, a similar storm rages, and the whale roams the sea once more…

name: I Alone Survived
description: The sea has calmed, but Captain Ahab and his crew are gone. Ishmael, who first brought you to the Riccioli Islands, seems to be studying the relics left behind by the legendary captain…

name: La La Echo
description: A musician in Ragunna City seems troubled by his Echo companion Melody...

name: The Plushie Village
description: Guided by the Pioneer Association, you arrive at an intriguing place known as the Plushie Village.

name: Woman in Mask
description: A well-dressed mysterious person in a mask has appeared on Riccioli Island, but their odd demeanor doesn't match their refined attire.

name: The Sailor's Treasure
description: Not all treasure of the sea is left behind by pirates, some could have been left by ordinary sailors... or a captain.

name: Silent as a Falling Leaf
description: The incident concludes with Zani reporting to Carlotta, while Phoebe appears lost in thought. If intrigued, follow the statue's guidance on the upper tier of the vault to uncover the final "secret cache."

name: Pincer Maneuver Warriors
description: A mysterious combat simulation program has gone viral on the Academy's Huaxu Hive. Researcher Lizhu, an active user, seems to have insights on this intriguing program...

name: Message in a Bottle
description: If you come across a message in a bottle, don't hesitate to check it out. Who knows, it might be one with precious dreams and hopes inside...

name: Go Get Some Fish
description: It's fish-hunting time!

name: John Wicktorio: No Debts for Old Men
description: John Wicktorio from Elga Town is in a spot of trouble.

name: John Wicktorio: No Debts for Old Men—Epilogue
description: The tasks is complete. Wicktorio wants to discuss your... fees.

name: Every Flavor Bell-less Crab Challenge
description: When you take the bell off the Bell Crab, do you steam it, roast it, or... turn it into something special?

name: Hooked on Trouble
description: You may catch more than just fish when out at sea...

name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow
description: You run into Lenore, an acolyte of the Order, standing next to an Aria Mummer. She seems to be in trouble...

name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Storm
description: The time has come to unravel the secrets of the Forbidden Archive...

name: Skyward Voyage: Epilogue
description: The captain named David has finally taken the Gondola to the skies, but will this voyage go as planned?

name: Margherita's Daily Special I
description: A pair of cautious eyes from the corner of Margherita's restaurant seem to call for your attention. Drop by and take a look when you have the chance.

name: Margherita's Daily Special II
description: Lelia has been working at the restaurant for a while now. If you're hungry, why not stop by and see how she's doing?

name: Margherita's Daily Special III
description: Thanks to your support, Lelia has found the courage to pursue a career of cooking. Stop by and taste her dish when you're free.

name: Margherita's Daily Special IV
description: Not one to dwell on past failures, Lelia has thrown herself into her next attempt.

name: Margherita's Daily Special IV
description: Not one to dwell on past failures, Lelia has thrown herself into her next attempt.

name: Margherita's Daily Special IV
description: Not one to dwell on past failures, Lelia has thrown herself into her next attempt.

name: Margherita's Daily Special V
description: Despite her many failures, you've decided to give Lelia one more chance. Will she succeed this time?

name: Margherita's Daily Special VI
description: Having asked about your preferences, Lelia might surprise you with something truly special this time. Visit Margherita's restaurant and find out.

name: Margherita's Daily Special VI
description: Having asked about your preferences, Lelia might surprise you with something truly special this time. Visit Margherita's restaurant and find out.

name: Margherita's Daily Special VI
description: Having asked about your preferences, Lelia might surprise you with something truly special this time. Visit Margherita's restaurant and find out.

name: Margherita's Daily Special VI
description: Having asked about your preferences, Lelia might surprise you with something truly special this time. Visit Margherita's restaurant and find out.

name: Margherita's Daily Special VIII
description: With your help, Lelia has officially become a chef at Margherita's restaurant. Stop by and try her cooking whenever you have time.

name: The Bizarre Brothers: Fratellone
description: You helped Fratellone resolve all his troubles, and he wants to thank you in person.

name: The Bizarre Brothers: Fratello
description: You helped Fratello complete all his trials, and he wants to thank you in person.

name: The Bizarre Brothers: Fratellino
description: You helped Fratellino resolve all his troubles, and he wants to thank you in person.

name: The Bizarre Brothers
description: You helped the three brothers with their respective troubles, and they want to thank you in person.

name: Traces of Tides
description:
Fulmine, the manager of Wutherium Film Studio, looks worried these days.
The deadline for the next periodical is around the corner, but he seems to have trouble picking the right photos... he beseeched the Laureate for help.

name: Defeat the TDs
description: Powerful TDs have been spotted in the wild. Go and eliminate them to maintain peace.

name: Defeat the TDs
description: Powerful TDs have been spotted in the wild. Go and eliminate them to maintain peace.

description: Powerful TDs have been spotted in the wild. Go and eliminate them to maintain peace.

name: Margherita's Daily Special VII
description: Maybe now is a good time to drop by Margherita's restaurant and see how your recommendation for Lelia turned out.

name: Dream Patrol I
description: You received a message from the white cat of the Somnoire. Go talk to it in Ragunna City.

name: Dream Patrol II
description: Continue the challenges of Dream Patrol and defeat the Nightmares hidden within the Dreamscape Nodes.

name: Dream Patrol: Finale
description: The dust of Ragunna's Dreamscape Nodes incident has settled for now. Go talk to the white cat in Ragunna City.

name: Lollo Campaign: Comeback
description: Your old friend Maji is back again with his "Brand New Lollo Campaign Plan. You guess it... a friend indeed is a friend in need.

name: Defeat the TDs
description: Powerful TDs have been spotted in the wild. Go and eliminate them to maintain peace.

name: Defeat the TDs
description: Powerful TDs have been spotted in the wild. Go and eliminate them to maintain peace.

description: Adventures in the Water City-Hadrian's Gladiator

name: Restore Plushie Village I
description: Through your hard work, meaningful changes have taken root in Plushie Village. In the meantime, the village receives a new visitor—a Tubpup.

name: Restore Plushie Village II
description: Through your hard work, meaningful changes have taken root in Plushie Village. In the meantime, the village receives a new visitor...

name: Restore Plushie Village III
description: You retrieved a photo from the sphere inside the morph painting, which reveals clues to a hidden past...

name: Restore Plushie Village IV
description: Finally, the restoration of the Plushie Village is complete! There will be a small celebration party and you're invited!

name: Shadows of the Past
description:
The Fisalia family's heir seems to have a request.
In Thessaleo Fells, a mysterious Terminal is flickering with ominous light. What secrets of the past might it hold?

description: Adventures in the Water City-Bakie

description: Adventures in the Water City-Aria Mummer

description: Adventures in the Water City-Gondola

name: The Best Audience
description: Lorenzo from Egla Town seems in need of help.

name: Although Colors Have No Form
description:
Beside a mysterious morph painting, you find a painter named Claudia, trapped in her nightmares. 
Claudia asks you to investigate the world within the painting and gives you a protective talisman.

name: Although Colors Have No Form: Epilogue
description:
The investigation of the mysterious morph painting concludes smoothly, and it seems Claudia wishes to thank you in person.
Perhaps it's time to pay her a visit.

name: Treasures in the Painting
description: Some part of the painted tower is glowing.

name: Tales of the Past and Present: Averardo Vault
description: Fuling in Egla Town is collecting these pages of scattered books. Go and deliver the pages found in Averardo Vault to her.

name: Shadow of Glory
description: Seek victory in the city of glory while searching for tales hidden in shadow.

name: Ocean Is a Soul's Rest
description: The ominous sound drifting from the fog lures the lost seafarers, drawing them into the land of death where Tacet Discords run wild.

name: Ocean Is a Soul's Rest
description: The ominous sound drifting from the fog lures the lost seafarers, drawing them into the land of death where Tacet Discords run wild.

name: The Adventures of Plushie Squad
description: You receive a call from Fulmine, who was asked by a few mysterious "people" to send you an invitation...

name: The Adventures of Plushie Squad
description: You and the plushies journey above the clouds, where a world of wonder awaits your discovery.

name: Beyond the Waves
description: The Pioneer Association and Lollo Logistics introduced another joint campaign. Go check it out over at the Lollo Logistics Truck.

name: Fantasies of the Thousand Gateways
description: A familiar voice echoes through the dreamscape's frequencies, introducing himself as "Ebony Gatekeeper." You decide to seek him out and uncover what he's up to.

name: Your Summer Will Never Wither
description: While heading to Trattoria Margherita, you encounter Carlotta, who invites you to join her for dinner. During the meal, you overhear a rumor about Daemons...

name: The Adventures of Plushie Squad
description: As your adventure comes to an end, you learn that the Plushie Village still has another surprise waiting for you.

name: Old Man and the Whale
description: A long-dead captain, a ship that cannot sail. Yet now, that captain has set upon an inevitable course, and the ship must sail once again...

name: Flames of Heart
description: The curtain has fallen on the grand competitions. Don your medal and travel onward to the Vale of Glory, where you shall make a decision that may change how the story goes.

name: Three Wishes
description: The turmoil in Septimont has been resolved. Enjoy the moment of peaceful respite with your fellow traveler.

name: Companionship
description: The turmoil in Septimont has been resolved. Enjoy the beautiful sunset with your companion.

name: Should the Shooting Stars Blaze
description: You find a mysterious "light spark." Follow this little spark, and you may witness the shooting stars blaze.

name: Should the Shooting Stars Blaze
description: You find a mysterious "light spark." Follow this little spark, and you might witness the shooting stars blaze.

name: Should the Shooting Stars Blaze
description: You find a mysterious "light spark." Follow this little spark, and you may witness the shooting stars blaze.

name: Virtual Crisis
description: Intermittent cries for help can be heard from the Port City of Guixu. They sound oddly familiar. It's best to go check out what's happening.

name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens
description:
The Dreamer seals her heart and surrenders to a world of dreams beyond mortal sight. In this hidden realm built upon melancholy melodies, she walks a path of fragile hope and delusions without looking back. But the dreams she longs to realize have long been tangled up in shadow and deceit. Beneath the lofty facade of the Orchestrator, who seems to have everything, is but a wretched, pitiful soul, drowning in her own illusions.

In the end, will this dream of blooming and withering be a sweet reverie or a haunting nightmare?

name: If You Gaze Into the Abyss of Dreams
description: A girl called Dorothy appears next to a mysterious gate. She claims a sudden crisis is taking place inside.

name: If You Gaze Into the Abyss of Dreams: Epilogue
description: Ebony Gatekeeper tells you of an anomaly inside the Somnoire. Something lurking there is sinisterly gazing at this world. Perhaps this is not the end, but the beginning.

name: (Do not display) Co-op Challenge show display
description: (Do not display) Co-op Challenge show display

name: (Do not display) Connecting to the challenge to hide display
description: (Do not display) Connecting to the challenge to hide display

name: Rewards
description: Rewards

name: Serendipity
description: The turmoil in Septimont has been resolved. The young lady who offered you help is now on vacation.

name: Changing Weather
description: New work comes up. Buling is forced to extend her stay in Septimont.

name: Avinoleum Footsteps
description: An elderly hermit is writing his memoirs by the seminary ruins. He would like some images of Avinoleum.

name: Lollo Campaign, Set Sail!
description: You meet Maji from Lollo Logistics in Ragunna. What new campaign is he planning?

name: Lollo Campaign, Set Sail!
description: You meet Maji from Lollo Logistics in Ragunna. What new campaign is he planning?

name: Lollo Campaign I
description: You received an errand from Jinzhou. What? Flour in Ragunna only costs half as much as in Jinzhou?!

name: Lollo Campaign III
description:
This third errand is from a mysterious lady. Who knew Heliobane Fungia had beautifying properties?
Please complete Main Quest Chapter II Act 3 "What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing" if you are unable to deliver the quest item.

name: Lollo Campaign IV
description: A priceless package has been shipped across the ocean to Ragunna. It is said that its freight insurance premium alone costs millions of credits!

name: Lollo Campaign II
description: Go to Maji's place and check for new errands.

name: Lollo Campaign V
description: Bakethoven's dream is to belong to the Echo Depository of Averardo Vault. Can you help him out?

name: Lollo Campaign VI
description: It's time for the Vault to assess Bakethoven's capabilities. Can its dream finally come true?

name: Lollo Campaign VII
description: Maji's business is expanding rapidly. New errands just came in... An Echo needs help looking for someone?

name: Banners Never Fall
description: The Septimont authorities are holding challenge matches in the Old District. Brave gladiator, seize the glory!

name: Flames in the Deep
description: Tracking Phrolova's Phantom to the Mournfell Canyon, you learn about a lost legend of the "Undying Monster"...

name: A Blaze in the Dark
description: You witness a crime at the stroke of midnight. To your surprise, a familiar figure appears at the scene...

name: Memory Travelogue
description: KU-Lolo has a new idea to turn your fondest memories into unique Cube souvenirs in the Second Coming of Solaris! <color=HighlightB>Head on over to the Memory Travelogue event</color>, collect memories with with the Cubes, and turn them in to KU-Lolo!

name: Memory Travelogue
description: KU-Lolo has a new idea to turn your fondest memories into unique Cube souvenirs in the Second Coming of Solaris! <color=HighlightB>Head to the event page to participate in the event</color>, collect memories with with the Cubes, and turn them in to KU-Lolo!

name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens
description:
The Dreamer seals her heart and surrenders to a world of dreams beyond mortal sight. In this hidden realm built upon melancholy melodies, she walks a path of fragile hope and delusions without looking back. But the dreams she longs to realize have long been tangled up in shadow and deceit. Beneath the lofty facade of the Orchestrator, who seems to have everything, is but a wretched, pitiful soul, drowning in her own illusions.

In the end, will this dream of blooming and withering be a sweet reverie or a haunting nightmare?

name: The One that Impresses
description: You receive a message from Encore, saying that she has obtained something super amazing and fun, and that she's excited to share it with you. What could it be?

name: Lollo Campaign: Verification
description: The Lollo Campaign is facing an unexpected crisis! To save Maji's career, and to keep those convenient services running, help him verify the reliability of Lollo Campaign!

name: Beyond the Waves
description: The Pioneer Association and Lollo Logistics introduced another joint campaign. Go check it out over at the Lollo Logistics Truck.

name: Dreaming Deep: Solaris Film Festival
description: You received a contact from the Ivory and Ebony Gatekeepers. Something must've happened with the Somnoire.

name: Abbowser Quest
description: Head to Abbowser Castle and rescue your captured Cube companions. Stop Abbowser's evil plan and make sure the celebration goes off without a hitch!

name: Our story has only just begun!
description: To keep Abbowser from causing more trouble, you have to keep advancing in the Abbowser Castle.

name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
description:
A strange message draws your attention to a mysterious Echo dueling game called Peaks of Prestige.
"Countless Echoes. Limitless tactics. You could be the next Apex Duelist!"

name: By Sun's Burning Hand
description: As the High Tide draws near, a lurking calamity stirs, with its gaze fixed upon the borders of Septimont. Ephor Augusta invites you to the Sanguis Plateaus for a fateful hunt, the one that may decide the realm's survival...

name: Uncovering Past Heroes
description:
The clouds above bear witness to echoing battle cries, the wild lands remember the footsteps of warriors, and rushing currents carry the fiery passion of the brave. Here, every corner holds shining tributes to a glorious history. The towering cities, spires, and mighty walls forged by the people of the Septimont stand as enduring proof of their strength and resolve.

At the harbor, you meet a quarreling father and daughter. This unexpected encounter sets you on a journey to uncover the rich history of Septimont...

name: Stagnant Dawn on Wastelands
description: A pair of constantly shifting spatial coordinates leading to an unknown location has caught your attention. Following the trail, you reach a metropolis... that had been erased long ago.

name: Banners Never Fall
description: The "Banners Never Fall" Challenges is about to end. Brave Gladiator, it's time to claim your glory!

name: Tales of the Past and Present: Avinoleum
description: Fuling in Egla Town is collecting these pages of scattered books. Go and deliver the pages found in Avinoleum to her.

name: By Moon's Fated Light
description: With the Sovereign slain, you attend the victory ceremony by invitation of Ceremonial Officer Bruno. The celebration honors the new Hero of Heroes and those who stood by their side amidst the crackling bonfire and joyous cheers of the crowd... Now that the countless petals are to be thrown into the sky to become the rain of glory and triumph, you might finally reunite with the girl you have never forgotten in a way even beyond fate's grasp.

name: By Sun's Burning Hand
description: As the High Tide draws near, a lurking calamity stirs, with its gaze fixed upon the borders of Septimont. Ephor Augusta invites you to the Sanguis Plateaus for a fateful hunt, the one that may decide the realm's survival...

name: Where Sky is Clear and Glory Shines: Guardian Tower
description:
Centuries ago, a lone Gladiator and his servant stood watch in a coastal tower, far from the arenas and deep within the wilderness. Now, the tower bears the scars of the encroaching Dark Tide—weathered, cracked, but still standing, like a gravestone to a forgotten tale.
Recently, a young ecologist has been seen wandering near the tower, drawn by a familiar roar echoing from within...

name: Rust, Sword and the Sun
description: While waiting for contact from the Ephor's Palace, you and Abby arrive at Solis Tavern, where you run into a blind wandering bard—Nestor. Having learned of the Ephor's invitation to the hunt, Nestor shares with you Augusta's stories before she rose to power.

name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens
description:
The Dreamer seals her heart and surrenders to a world of dreams beyond mortal sight. In this hidden realm built upon melancholy melodies, she walks a path of fragile hope and delusions without looking back. But the dreams she longs to realize have long been tangled up in shadow and deceit. Beneath the lofty facade of the Orchestrator, who seems to have everything, is but a wretched, pitiful soul, drowning in her own illusions.

In the end, will this dream of blooming and withering be a sweet reverie or a haunting nightmare?
