name: The Bygone Shall Always Return
description: To open the Sentinel's Relic, you head back to Ragunna once more...

name: Virtual Crisis: Frontier Trials
description: Tethys's crisis simulation program is getting an upgrade. With newly gathered data from the Black Shores and Rinascita, even harsher scenarios now await those who dare to face the challenge…

name: Overflowing Picture Book
description: You meet Alix, who carries a picture book filled with landscapes from across Rinascita. But its colors have all faded, leaving him heartbroken. Moved by his sorrow, you decide to restore the book's lost hues and help bring its beauty back to life.

name: Agon of Champions: The Last Call
description: Now the medal of victory rests upon your chest.

name: Where Sky is Clear and Glory Shines: Trial Grounds
description:
Centuries ago, the Dark Tide destroyed the trial grounds here, burying ancient glories and deeds.
Now, as you tread the wilds, a call echoes from the depths of the ruins…

name: When the Sky Watches Us Meet
description: After a while, you receive a message from Tulia. The two Scourgewings you rescued have appeared near Border Mountains. She's already there... Better not make them wait.

name: Plushie Squad's Clean Return
description: After a long journey, the plushie squad is a mess… Let's help them freshen up and get sparkling clean again.

name: Plushie Expedition Squad
description: In Septimont, you received a message from Fulmine: A tiny plushie expedition squad from Ragunna has somehow arrived here too…

name: Banners Never Fall
description: Complete Challenge Zone I

name: Duel of Destiny
description: Two legendary Gladiators are about to face their destined duel atop the tower. Sulpicia asks you to learn the story behind it…

name: Dream Contagion
description: Complete the challenge and defeat the Nightmare hidden within the Dreamscape Node.

name: Samousas's Treasure
description: Samousas stash was washed downstream. To fulfill his childhood dream, he asks you to retrieve the lost box.

name: Fantastic Ta-das and Where to Find Them
description: By the cliff's edge, a peculiar girl draws your attention. She seems to be attempting some sort of challenge.

name: Banners Never Fall
description: Warriors of Septimont... Explore the land, fight the strong foes, and set up banners of glory that never fall!

name: Flowing Starlight in the Iris
description: After you escaped from Honami City, Chisa, who had pushed herself to the brink of overclocking more than once, received treatment at the Black Shores. You've been apart ever since. Now, it's time to visit her again. For both of you, this will be a new beginning.

name: Walk the Path of the Dragon
description: Jocaresa asked for your help collecting Remnant Energy crystals from the dragon bones. She claims this could grant you the power of an ancient dragon.

name: Deep Sea Survey
description: The Fabricatorium of the Deep has stirred beneath the waves, its unrest quietly noted by the nobles and the Order. To prevent further disruption to the lives of the people of Ragunna and to avoid unnecessary panic, both sides held a rare private meeting. In an unprecedented move, they reached a consensus: a full re-survey of the facility must be conducted to inform joint discussions on the fate of the Fabricatorium and the Common Echoes it holds. As the only one to return from that place unscathed, you are undoubtedly the best person to lead this expedition.

name: Bread and Holy Rituals
description: Butler the Steward seems troubled about taking care of the Acolytes in the Fabricatorium of the Deep. Talk to him and learn what's weighing on his mind.

name: May Applause Greet You
description: It seems like the nearby hunting camp was attacked. Go check it out.

name: Windrider Project
description: The Huaxu Academy has recently made a breakthrough in Utility tech. Researcher Lanyan now requests your help testing a new tool near the Academy.

name: Tidal Defense Simulator
description: The agents of the Black Shores have long been the first to respond in times of crisis, shouldering the responsibilities of fighting TD Outbreaks head on. The Black Shores has developed specialized combat devices designed to lower the risks they face in fighting the TDs—Valentina is now leading simulation tests of the devices, and she's counting on your assistance to push the tests forward.

name: Tidal Defense Simulator
description: Report back to Valentina

name: A Stranger in a Strange Land
description: In this battle that sealed the fate of Rinascita, its people rose in defiance. And among them stood another, a swordsman of Huanglong, guided across the seas by Huanglong Mingting to lend you his strength. He fought as one among the countless souls drawn to this hour, but the story of his own journey, and the shadows of his past, remain known to few…
chapterName: A Stranger in a Strange Land

name: Epilogue: The Lost Beyond
description: You return to Ragunna to see whether the aftermath of the Fabricatorium of the Deep reached the people there, but unexpectedly run into Zani in the city. Might as well talk to her to catch up with the situation.

name: The Present and the Future
description: You return to Ragunna to see whether the aftermath of the Fabricatorium of the Deep reached the people there, but unexpectedly run into Zani in the city. Might as well talk to her to catch up with the situation.

name: Overhear Fenrico’s whereabouts from the Acolytes
description: Overhear Fenrico’s whereabouts from the Acolytes

name: Phrolova side quest
description: Phrolova side quest

name: Return to the Lost Beyond after completing Main Mission
description: Return to the Lost Beyond after completing Main Mission

name: Dialogue with Triss in the Lost Beyond
description: Dialogue with Triss in the Lost Beyond

name: Listen to music in Phrolova’s room
description: Listen to music in Phrolova’s room

name: Book Seller
description: Book Seller

name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part I
description: In a valley scarred by the Dark Tide, an old Gladiator silently awaits his destiny. Like an ancient, rusted sword, he dreams of past glories.

name: Beyond the Waves
description: The Pioneer Association and Lollo Logistics introduced another joint campaign. Go check it out over at the Lollo Logistics Truck.

name: Prints of Plateaus
description: You meet an old lady in the Asphodel Barrens. She gazes at the fleeting frequencies off into the distance in search of a lost companion who can never return...

name: What Burns Beneath Frostlands
description: The gateway to Lahai-Roi is now open! What burns beneath the frostlands is waiting for your return!
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: What Burns Beneath Frostlands
description: After your surprise encounter with Lynae, you enroll under her guidance. Startorch Academy, Spacetrek Collective, the New Solar Ceremony... This "academic capital" starts to reveal itself to you.
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Second Coming of Solaris (Ultra)
description: In Jinzhou, you come across a man who appears to be distressed. He claims to have survived a mysterious attack…

name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part II
description: In a valley scarred by the Dark Tide, an old Gladiator silently awaits his destiny. Like an ancient, rusted sword, he dreams of past glories.

name: Ode to the Second Sunrise
description: You and Mornye decide to split up. As the Predicted One mentioned by the Heliodic Six, you will head to the Solisylum. Meanwhile, Mornye will investigate the device that triggered the Void Storm and confront Foreseer Yngvar. You agree to stay in contact and reunite later.
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Finale
description: One departs in the dream. Many return from the dream.

name: What Burns Beneath Frostlands
description: Hyvatia is out of control. The Void Storms are getting worse, a dark conspiracy is exposed, and a crisis is imminent... The time has come to cut through the lies.
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Ode to the Second Sunrise
description: The Voidworm threat has finally subsided. To ensure the New Solar Ceremony can proceed as planned, Mornye from the Research Institute schedules a meeting with you and Lynae at the dormitory, hoping to learn more about the Hyvatia Detector's sudden loss of control. Yet hidden dangers still linger, and securing the Ceremony's success may prove far more complicated than it seems…
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Marks of the Wild
description: You receive a new message from the Hunter's Den: Please examine the traces left by TDs and track them down.

name: Love of Wisdom
description: When victory arrives, the branches of glory bend to kiss the warrior's forehead.

name: Freeze Frame: Action Highlights
description: Fulmine seems to have something to discuss. Go see what's up.

name: All That Sunlight Touches
description: To reach your goal, you delve deeper into the Exostrider plan, all the while, anomalies hidden in the frostlands reveal themselves.
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Ode to the Second Sunrise
description: After the New Solar Ceremony concludes, Helio's radiance spills across the land of Lahai-Roi. Just then, you receive a message from the infirmary: Mornye—who ventured into the Reactor Drive alone and suffered grievous injuries—has finally awakened.
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Lament Recon: Solaris Soldier
description: Head to Ragunna City

name: Morning Star I
description: The crisis is over, but Rinascita still has a long road ahead of it…

name: Morning Star II
description: The displaced long to rebuild the Old District into their new home, but evil clings like a shadow.

name: Morning Star III
description: The kindness once sown now bears fruit.

name: Morning Star IV
description: Now the storm has passed, let us celebrate again.

name: Morning Star Epilogue
description: It's time to leave. Have one last talk with Lenore.

name: Morning Star: Those Who Remain in the Night Part I
description: There seems to be a commotion going on in the Old District, with a noblewoman surrounded by a crowd. She looks all too familiar…

name: Morning Star: Those Who Remain in the Night Part II
description: Luther makes a surprise visit to the Old District and seems to be after someone. You soon realize who that someone is…

name: The Star That Voyages Far
description: To find the Exostrider and uncover the truth behind your frequency loss, you step into the falling snow and venture toward the silent, pale expanse of the frostlands.
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Help Cherry hand out the tonic
description: Help Cherry hand out the tonic to those in need

name: Mummer's Wish
description: You rescued a weak Aria Mummer near Septimont City. It entrusts you with four Melody Boxes, each carrying a piece of music. What story might they tell?

name: Lollo Genie Campaign: Day 1
description: Maji tells you about his new campaign. An Echo named "Bliss" sends a request, hoping you can help take promotional photos for the ads to attract more customers.

name: Lollo Genie Campaign: Day 2
description: The Plushie Squad is stuck in a creative slump and needs your help. You decide to get them out of it.

name: Lollo Genie Campaign: Day 3
description: Some tension has arisen between a pair of Echo partners. You decide to look into it.

name: Lollo Genie Campaign: Day 4
description: Maji receives a complaint about a missing package. You decide to track it down and return it to its Echo owner.

name: Lollo Genie Campaign: Day 5
description: A Diggy Duggy sends you a request, hoping you'll help find the treasure it once buried with its young master.

name: Lollo Genie Campaign: Day 6
description: Maji's system receives a request from a Tubpup who's asking for your help to upgrade the bathing service.

name: Lollo Genie Campaign: Day 7
description: After taking Margherita's call, you decide to spend the last day of the campaign cooking with Bakie.

name: Lollo Genie Campaign: Start
description: Maji tells you about his new campaign centered on the Echoes of Ragunna, and you decide to lend him a hand.

name: The Star That Voyages Far
description: Following the traces she had left behind, you pass by a calm and ordinary lake, where the Exostrider in the frostlands is awaiting your arrival.
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides
description: With the Dark Tide's threat to Ragunna eliminated, you prepare to set off to Septimont City...

name: Dreams of Cindertide
description: Complete all Dreams of Cindertide challenges across the Wastelands

name: Namipon Search - The Last Bow
description: Congratulations, Detective! You've found all the lost Namipons in Honami City. When you have time, head over to Shashou Cafe and have a chat with Polmes.

name: Egla Town Statue Visibility Test
description: Egla Town Statue Visibility Test

name: Lollo Campaign: Ice Savior
description: Your old friend Maji swears he's found his break in Septimont with yet another one of his "genius" business ideas. But whether it takes off or crashes depends on your help.

name: Whispers of the Waves
description: Eri, a self-proclaimed member of the Pioneer Association, comes to the cafe and asks for your help in recovering the memories scattered in the Irideglow…

name: Where Light Takes Shape
description:
Minna has just bought her very first Terminal, but she doesn't seem to have the faintest idea how to use it...
Find her in Bjartr Woods and lend a hand before she accidentally breaks it.

name: No. 1 Biker
description: You've caught the attention of a particularly perceptive Terminal assistant. He claims there exists a race track where no one has ever crossed the finish line...

name: Daily Lahai-Roi Castaway I
description: Ever since the rift appeared, more and more castaway objects from Lahai-Roi have been showing up in Honami City. Recently, KU-Shosho seems eager to speak with you.

name: Daily Lahai-Roi Castaway II
description: To learn more about Lahai-Roi, you begin searching for castaway objects throughout Honami City. Time to visit Shashou Cafe. What object will you find this time?

name: Daily Lahai-Roi Castaway III
description: For some reason, the "Namipon family" always sends a different Namipon to brief you on castaway objects. Who will it be this time?

name: Daily Lahai-Roi Castaway IV
description: You're now an expert in finding castaway objects. What new and curious discoveries await you in Honami City?

name: Daily Lahai-Roi Castaway V
description: Gear up for another castaway object search. Your partner today seems to be the chattiest Namipon of them all.

name: Daily Lahai-Roi Castaway VI
description: Somehow, you get the feeling that the search won't go so smoothly this time. Better head to the cafe and check things out first.

name: Daily Lahai-Roi Castaway VII
description: The search for castaway objects is coming to an end. As usual, you head to Shashou Cafe…

name: Stranger Things in Honami
description: After the end of Honami's looping crisis, Chisa heads to the Black Shores to recover. Namipon from Shashou Cafe contacts you to request your help in investigating a series of strange occurrences throughout Honami City. Assist Namipon with the investigation while also gathering supplies to help rebuild the Shashou Cafe.

name: Fire It Up! Route Constructor!
description: Reconstructing the route network will help advance the Spacetrek Observatory's project. To do this, you need to find Chonglin, who will give you access to the Route Constructor and show you how to use it.

name: Spacetrek Observatory: Foundation Phase
description: You get involved in the reconstruction project of the Spacetrek Observatory by helping rebuild Lahai-Roi's route network.

name: Spacetrek Observatory: Platform Phase
description: With the baseplates already fully expanded and Dhalifa's physical condition improving, the next step is to build the Suspension Platform.

name: Spacetrek Observatory: Overwatch Phase
description: With the Suspension Platform ready, all that's left is to assemble the main structure. Complete this feat with Dhalifa, Sephira, and Rakosan!

name: Keep exploring Honami City
description: After the end of Honami's looping crisis, Chisa heads to the Black Shores to recover. Namipon from Shashou Cafe contacts you to request your help in investigating a series of strange occurrences throughout Honami City. Assist Namipon with the investigation while also gathering supplies to help rebuild the Shashou Cafe.

name: Capturing Starlight
description: At Startorch Academy, you come across two students in the middle of an argument. They claim to be the moderators of the “Everything Startorch” account and are stuck on what to post for their next feature. Strangely enough, their dilemma seems to have something to do with you, the “Voidworm Rider.”

name: The Comfort of Home
description: Rakosan, who's been fully devoted to the reconstruction of Spacetrek Observatory, finds himself with a visitor today...

name: The Whisper of Memories
description: A robot active on the suspension platform is emitting strange sounds…

name: A Secret
description: The Lightbeam Fencing restraining the rampaging Ironhoof doesn't seem like Royan tech, which captures your attention...

name: Realization
description: Sephira, having mended her ways, has joined the reconstruction project, but you can't shake the feeling she might still hold some bitterness inside. So, you decide to check on her, just to be sure…

name: The Star That Voyages Far
description: The road trip movie is nearing its end, and your journey together has truly made her happy and content.
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Into the Battle Simulation!
description: The Rabelle College seems to be recruiting participants for a virtual combat course. Head to the training platform to learn more.

name: Beyond the Waves
description: Strange livery, hooky tune… The familiar Lollo Logistics truck has returned! This time, it's rolled right up to the gates of Startorch Academy in Lahai-Roi. Go see what's going on!

name: Catch the Winds
description: A strange Royan merchant arrives near the Relay Station, unusually warm and eager to involve you in an odd transaction…

name: Receive the WavesLine message about the Outcast attacks
description: The Outcasts involved have been handed over to the Spacetrek Collective. There may be new updates soon…

name: Advance the Foundation Phase of the Spacetrek Observatory
description: Continue to rebuild the route network by increasing the Network Activity to 600

name: Advance the Platform Phase of the Spacetrek Observatory
description: Continue to rebuild the route network by increasing the Network Activity to 1200

name: Advance the Overwatch Phase of the Spacetrek Observatory
description: Continue to rebuild the route network by increasing the Network Activity to 2100

name: The Lost Melody
description:
A melody, once scattered to the winds, is now sought by Soliskin who yearn to hear it whole again. 
Follow them to a place heavy with memory. Work with the Soliskin to restore the lost "music sheet." If the music returns, the story it holds may finally awaken.

name: Catch the Winds
description: A strange Royan merchant arrives near the Relay Station, unusually warm and eager to involve you in an odd transaction…

name: Catch the Winds
description: A strange Royan merchant arrives near the Relay Station, unusually warm and eager to involve you in an odd transaction…

name: Dark Duel Legends: Part I
description: Rumor has it that at midnight, in the station, people engage in “Dark Duels,” battles waged with souls and lives. You decide to investigate the rumor yourself…

name: Rebuild the Orbit Valley Pass - North
description: Based on the current network status, we recommend prioritizing the rebuild of the Orbit Valley Pass - North. This will accelerate the renewal of Lahai-Roi's route network and support the reconstruction of the Spacetrek Observatory.

name: Rebuild the Orbit Valley Pass - South
description: Based on the current network status, we recommend prioritizing the rebuild of the Orbit Valley Pass - South. This will accelerate the renewal of Lahai-Roi's route network and support the reconstruction of the Spacetrek Observatory.

name: Rebuild the Sandreach Passage
description: Based on the current network status, we recommend prioritizing the rebuild of the Sandreach Passage. This will accelerate the renewal of Lahai-Roi's route network and support the reconstruction of the Spacetrek Observatory.

name: Rebuild the Farer's Road
description: Based on the current network status, we recommend prioritizing the rebuild of the Farer's Road. This will accelerate the renewal of Lahai-Roi's route network and support the reconstruction of the Spacetrek Observatory.

name: Rebuild the Sol's Embrace
description: Based on the current network status, we recommend prioritizing the rebuild of the Sol's Embrace. This will accelerate the renewal of Lahai-Roi's route network and support the reconstruction of the Spacetrek Observatory.

name: Rebuild the Spacetrek–Bjartr Bridge
description: Based on the current network status, we recommend prioritizing the rebuild of the Spacetrek–Bjartr Bridge. This will accelerate the renewal of Lahai-Roi's route network and support the reconstruction of the Spacetrek Observatory.

name: Rebuild the Howling Tunnel
description: Based on the current network status, we recommend prioritizing the rebuild of the Howling Tunnel. This will accelerate the renewal of Lahai-Roi's route network and support the reconstruction of the Spacetrek Observatory.

name: Rebuild the Starleap Ascent
description: Based on the current network status, we recommend prioritizing the rebuild of the Starleap Ascent. This will accelerate the renewal of Lahai-Roi's route network and support the reconstruction of the Spacetrek Observatory.

name: Rebuild the Submerged Tunnel
description: Based on the current network status, we recommend prioritizing the rebuild of the Submerged Tunnel. This will accelerate the renewal of Lahai-Roi's route network and support the reconstruction of the Spacetrek Observatory.

name: Pulses of the Plains
description: Zahira, one of the "Startorch's Seven Great Mysteries," appears to be "negotiating" with a researcher. Her animated hand gestures give no clue whether she's casting a spell or haggling in some mysterious trade…

name: Peaks of Prestige: Rekindled Duel
description: A girl named Anita invites you into the Peaks of Prestige fan club. From her, you learn that the club is hanging by a thread...

name: Squeezy not Smiley
description: Abby wants to try Startorch Academy's cafeteria dishes.

name: Beneath a Melting Night Sky
description: Not long after the Stridergate incident, the Spacetrek Collective informs you that Denia is awake and being kept in isolation. To learn the Fractsidus's next step and open new directions for future research, you head to the infirmary to negotiate with Denia. There, she offers you a "deal." In exchange, you'll need to stay with her for her birthday...
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Message from Lollo Logistics
description: I.R.I.S. seems to need your help. Maybe you should go check on her.

name: Where Starry Seas Endure II
description: Harriet seems troubled by something. Speak with her and learn what it's about.

name: Hidden Childhood
description: You come across kids playing hide-and-seek. They promise you their “treasure” if you can find all of them within the time limit…

name: A Free Lunch?
description: After the Celebration begins, Lynae sends you a new WavesLine message. Accept her invitation and join her for lunch.

name: Bucket List
description: You received a WavesLine message from an unknown sender

name: Return to Light
description: Misha's mother has been away for quite a while. She may need some help...

name: A Night of Shimmering Stars
description: You helped a student named Ang recover her stargazing guide. To her, it's more than just a booklet; it carries the weight of a promise she shared with her friends…

name: Welcome to the Fan Club
description: You meet an enthusiastic student named Bjarki. Thanks to his recommendations, you find yourself intrigued by all the different "fan clubs" across the Academy…

name: Ultimate Challenge
description: At the Research Institute, you encounter two troubled researchers. They seem to be wrestling with a difficult problem…

name: Dark Duel Legends: Part II
description: Rumor has it that at midnight, in the station, people engage in “Dark Duels,” battles waged with souls and lives. You decide to investigate the rumor yourself…

name: Dark Duel Legends: Part III
description: Rumor has it that at midnight, in the station, people engage in “Dark Duels,” battles waged with souls and lives. You decide to investigate the rumor yourself…

name: Final Reverberation I
description: You hand the “treasure” taken from the kids to I.R.I.S. The system analysis reveals it's connected to a missing professor. You decide to look deeper.

name: Final Reverberation II
description: You hand the “treasure” taken from the kids to I.R.I.S. The system analysis reveals it's connected to a missing professor. You decide to look deeper.

name: Peaks of Prestige: Rekindled Duel
description: A girl named Anita invites you into the Peaks of Prestige fan club. From her, you learn that the club is hanging by a thread...

name: Rekindled Duel: Lahai-Roi Regional Tournament
description: Anita acknowledges your dueling talent and invites you to join the Peaks of Prestige Lahai-Roi Regional Tournament. Defeat every challenger and claim the regional championship!

name: Route Network Crisis Part I
description: The Lahai-Roi Route Network Office has issued an alert, and the Outcast activity it mentioned captures your interest…

name: Route Network Crisis Part II
description: Once again, Outcast activity is reported near the route network. You suspect the situation may be more complex than it seems...

name: WavesLine Insider
description: The mysterious contact, the Outcast ambushes, the driver you keep running into… everything is finally coming together.

name: Moments Captured in Light
description: A WavesLine message arrives from a strange account named "Lightborne Horizons." With almost contagious enthusiasm, the sender invites you to join a photography event called "Light Chaser Collection"…

name: Where Starry Seas Endure I
description: You receive a WavesLine message asking for help. Check what it's about.

name: Urban Legend: The Tale Teller
description: The one who tells urban legends has mysteriously disappeared. Perhaps those who gaze long into anomalies find the anomalies gazing back, and may one day be devoured by them, becoming part of the anomaly itself... And you, tugging at the loose threads, begin to sense the secret behind it all...

name: Science Gone Mad I
description: You receive a mis-sent message: Ronan claims to have witnessed the "miraculous evolution of a Kronapuff" and excitedly invites you to see it…

name: Science Gone Mad II
description: Ronan, still hopelessly addicted to research, sends another message, this time about a fantastic "plant"…

name: Science Gone Mad III
description: Milo reached out to you via WavesLine, inviting you to join a newly formed group called the "AnomSci Group." That's not all—he also mentioned that he, Ronan, and Aniko have prepared something new, and they'd like to give it to you in person.

name: Science Gone Mad IV
description: To apply for funding, Ronan and his colleagues have each submitted a research proposal. Can you guess which one ends up getting approved?

name: Science Gone Mad V
description: Recently, Milo has started his research project, and he wonders what you might make of his ideas...

name: Sixteen Centimillion Bits
description: The hard-core gamer Songdis proposes a retro game music project and is looking for collaborators…

name: Where Wisdom Lights the Way
description: A Roya girl pauses before a stone wall. She explains that it holds one of the foundations of the Roya tribe, a record of the operating patterns of the Reactor Drive. You decide to join her in relighting these petroglyphs, restoring the wisdom with which the Roya once measured their world and ensuring their brilliance never fades.

name: Where Wisdom Lights the Way
description: A Roya girl pauses before a stone wall. She explains that it holds one of the foundations of the Roya tribe, a record of the operating patterns of the Reactor Drive. You decide to join her in relighting these petroglyphs, restoring the wisdom with which the Roya once measured their world and ensuring their brilliance never fades.

name: Vehicle Driving Tutorial
description: You've obtained a vehicle. Please follow the WavesLine instructions and go to the Training Terminal to complete vehicle driving tutorial.

name: Urban Legend: The Anonymous Inviter
description: A WavesLine message from an anonymous sender draws you into a world of urban legends, unknowns, and anomalies. Investigate, record them, or verify, debunk them... Present evidence strong enough to speak for itself.

name: Urban Legend: Train to Who-Knows-Where
description: Out in the wild, an urban legend takes shape. A Midnight Train, said to be packed with "ghosts," races endlessly through the night, toward who knows where... Is it truly as Mayo claimed? Gather your courage and go take a look!

name: Unparalleled Mechascout
description: Help Zeon find all four Mechascout parts and complete the statue

name: The Sea Just Within Reach
description: Discuss the Submerged Tunnel rebuild with Abby

name: Eliminate the TDs
description: Powerful TDs have been spotted in the wild. Go and eliminate them to maintain peace.

name: Eliminate the TDs
description: Powerful TDs have been spotted in the wild. Go and eliminate them to maintain peace.

name: Eliminate the TDs
description: Powerful TDs have been spotted in the wild. Go and eliminate them to maintain peace.

name: Eliminate the TDs
description: Powerful TDs have been spotted in the wild. Go and eliminate them to maintain peace.

name: Eliminate the TDs
description: Powerful TDs have been spotted in the wild. Go and eliminate them to maintain peace.

name: When the Known Thrums!
description: Head to the Celebration venue and investigate the missing prototype patrol mech with Lynae.

name: If You Catch Up to It...
description: Head to the lab and look for the clues left by the missing patrol mech with Lynae.

name: I'll Show You the Mech
description: You've located the missing patrol mech. Head into the wilderness and retrieve it.

name: Where the Iridescent Rain Falls
description: The incident has been resolved. Accept Lynae's invitation and meet her at the square fountain.

name: Void Storm Reinforcement
description: Complete all Void Storm Reinforcement assignments and claim rewards from S.I.G.M.A.

name: Urban Legend: No-Escape Classroom
description: Somewhere in the Academy, a mystery takes shape. A classroom that becomes a no-escape zone after class.... Is it truly as Mayo claimed? Gather your courage and go take a look!

name: Medical Supplies
description: The supply-starved camp is in desperate need of medical supplies…

name: Voidspawn Emergence
description: The abnormal Voidworm activity has been contained, and the Academy's crisis has passed. While the Voidworm has returned to its normal route, lingering Voidmatter disturbances have yet to fully dissipate. Continued monitoring is required.

name: Fest Guest: Zani
description: Zani is enjoying a rare vacation, but she doesn't quite seem used to it. Go talk to her in the Outdoor Lounge.

name: Where Wisdom Lights the Way
description: A Roya girl pauses before a stone wall. She explains that it holds one of the foundations of the Roya tribe, a record of the operating patterns of the Reactor Drive. You decide to join her in relighting these petroglyphs, restoring the wisdom with which the Roya once measured their world and ensuring their brilliance never fades.

name: Urban Legend: Lost in the Fog Tunnel
description: Deep in the station tunnel, an urban legend takes shape. The thick fog, the extra side path… are these real phenomena, or just idle gossip? Gather your courage and go take a look!

name: Operation: Frontier Renewal
description: You need clearance to activate the Route Constructor and help the Spacetrek Observatory reconstruct the route network. Talk to Chonglin, who is in charge of the route network, and acquire clearance.

name: Rebuild the Observatory-Academy Highway
description: Based on the current network status, we recommend prioritizing the rebuild of the Observatory-Academy Highway. This will accelerate the renewal of Lahai-Roi's route network and support the reconstruction of the Spacetrek Observatory.

name: Urban Legend: The Rogue Constructor
description: In the Collapsed Arcbend Ravine, an urban legend takes shape. Strange sounds, and an inexplicable "ghost" that can't be shut down... On a rainy night, gather your courage and go take a look! Are you ready to uncover the truth?

name: When the Unknown Thrums
description: The gateway to Lahai-Roi is now open! What burns beneath the frostlands is waiting for your return!
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Rev It Up! Startorch Race!
description: The new season of the Startorch Race is about to begin! Confident in your vehicle-handling skills, you are more than ready to jump in.

name: After the Race
description: The Startorch Race leaves you fulfilled and exhilarated. You decide to share that joy with Haley, who dedicated herself wholeheartedly to the event.

name: Radiance's Return
description: On the Soliseed Plains, Lyosroth is searching for the missing Soliskin…

name: Fest Guest: Yinlin
description: A familiar figure appears on the balcony. Go talk to her and catch up.

name: Fest Guest: Cantarella
description: Cantarella is reviewing the dishes. Has her sense of taste finally returned? Go chat with her at the Bar.

name: Fest Guest: Jiyan
description: Rarely one for festivities, Jiyan now stands before a displayed Echo, quietly gazing at it. Go find him and say hello.

name: Fest Guest: Lynae
description: You run into Lynae in the Screening Room. Did she… skip classes again? Maybe you should ask her yourself.

name: Purify the Tapes of Last Words
description:
When the Void Storm consumes personnel carrying a Cassette, the magnetic moment within the device becomes corrupted, reducing it to a Tape of Last Words. The encoded information is rendered unreadable.
A Mechasout in a Solsworn apparel is now collecting these Tapes of Last Words in the hope of "cleansing" the Voidmatter corruption and restoring the data once preserved within them.

name: Observatory-Academy Highway
description: Rebuild the Observatory-Academy Highway

name: Forever Fest and Lollo Party
description: At Lumi's invitation, you come to an unending party...

name: Falling Stars
description: Return to Forever Fest to see which companions have shown up today, and see if Lumi has uncovered something new.

name: The Answer Is Where a River of Stars Falls
description: Return to Forever Fest to see which companions have shown up today, and see if Lumi has uncovered something new.

name: Orbit Valley Pass - North
description: Rebuild the Orbit Valley Pass - North

name: Orbit Valley Pass - South
description: Rebuild the Orbit Valley Pass - South

name: Sandreach Passage
description: Rebuild the Sandreach Passage

name: Farer's Road
description: Rebuild Farer's Road

name: Sol's Embrace
description: Rebuild Sol's Embrace

name: Spacetrek–Bjartr Bridge
description: Rebuild the Spacetrek–Bjartr Bridge

name: Howling Tunnel
description: Rebuild the Howling Tunnel

name: Starleap Ascent
description: Rebuild the Starleap Ascent

name: Submerged Tunnel
description: Rebuild the Submerged Tunnel

name: Rabbit Reflected in Shades
description: After the New Solar Celebration comes to an end, Lucilla sends you a WavesLine message, saying that the root of the Dark Side anomaly remains unresolved. She hopes you can help her uncover the truth…
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: The Flaming Red from Tomorrow
description: After the Dark Side incident comes to an end, Lucilla meets with Hiyuki at the auditorium. Lucilla suspects that the Fractsidus may be plotting something far more dangerous behind the scenes…
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Blade Hunter: Wilderness
description: Around a Sonoro Sphere, you run across a troubled researcher, who seems to have an important job to do...

name: Blade Hunter: Wilderness
description: You help Timoteo recover his stolen funds. The incident comes to an end, his sorrow melting away like tears in the snow.

name: You Outshine the Fireworks
description: The Forever Fest has yet to end, but the Lollo Party is already drawing to a close. Moments of joy never last long, but beyond them lies a brilliant river of stars.

name: Full Throttle! Bolt & Blitz!
description: Due to excessive use of student data to train the system, development of the expedition motorbike simulator has stalled. Kinova, a member of the Biomatic Club, has come to you for help.

name: Full Throttle! Bolt & Blitz!
description: The test concluded successfully. It's time to report back to Kinova.

name: A Perfect Day for Flying
description: Even an island that has slumbered for years may hold sights that have withstood the test of time. At Sigrika's invitation, your journey into the unknown begins...

name: Gold Suspended in Shadows
description: The New Solar Celebration is just around the corner. Yet, President Lucilla detects a mysterious frequency appearing in the Academy's Dark Side—one that does not belong to the Academy. You suspect it may be the "reward" once mentioned by the Grand Architect of the Fractsidus. Determined to uncover the truth behind this anomaly, you venture into the Dark Side alongside Sigrika, a student you encountered there...
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Energy Supplement Trial Report
description: Mornye is completely absorbed in her work. For the sake of her health, head to the Agronomy Wing and get the Super Cubic Energy Supplement she asked for.

name: Environmental Variable Adjustment
description: Mornye invites you to assist with a new experiment.

name: Abnormal Dopamine Secretion
description: Mornye sends you another invitation. Head to the Golden Spiral and spend some relaxing time with her.

name: Standardized Happiness
description: To help Mornye reach her research goals, you've prepared a special schedule for her. Go meet her.

name: Sylph at Twilight
description: Mornye has completed her research and can't wait to share the results with you. Head to the Research Institute and meet her.

name: The Song of Ice and Steel
description: Though buried deep beneath the snow, the rusted iron bird still longs to sing.

name: Footprints on Frostlands
description:
On the endless expanse of the frostlands, countless relics lie quietly dormant beneath the frozen ice. Here, truth seekers and those who revere nature come in search of the destination of their pilgrimage.
A maintenance worker from the Frostlands Polar Research Outpost prepares to embark on her first vacation in a decade. She hopes you will guide her across the Roya Frostlands, documenting the views of the pole along the way...

name: From the Snow White
description: In front of Ero's tent, a pile of mysterious objects has appeared out of nowhere. Is this a troublesome mess or the beginning of a story? Go talk to Ero and find out what's going on.

name: "Festivals Don't Encore"
description: The New Solar Celebration has begun, and the entire campus is alive with excitement. Head to the venue and join the festivities!

name: "Department of Engineering Repair Scene"
description: Lucilla's projector is malfunctioning, causing her some trouble. Due to her tight schedule, lend her a hand and fix it.

name: "Life of a Resonator"
description: Lucilla recommends the beautiful scenery in the Academy Garden. Go take a look.

name: "4½"
description: Lucilla can't decide which film to choose. Head to the library and help her pick one.

name: "Life is Beautiful"
description: After a long stretch of busy work, Lucilla has finally found time to relax and watch a film with you. Accept Lucilla's invitation and enjoy this peaceful moment together.

name: Thank you, and farewell, my other self
description: Near the infirmary, you spot a student who has posted a wanted notice on himself...

name: Once Upon a Time in the Frostlands
description: What appears to be an ordinary ice block conceals the final traces left behind by members of a research outpost. Bring the recovered Frequency Cassette Recorder and Outpost Log back to the Research Institute, and talk to the staff responsible for Cassette retrieval.

name: Expedition Motorbike in the Ice Gorge
description: You've discovered an expedition motorbike in the ice gorge... Find a way to bring it back to the Starward Riseway.

name: From the Snow White
description: Things have settled for the moment. It's time to visit Ero...

name: The Moored Boat
description: "Aemeath" is waiting for you on the rooftop of Rabelle College. Go meet her.

name: Creases on Paper
description: Sigrika has a gift for you as an apology.

name: Ground Engravings
description: To live up to everyone's expectations, Sigrika has been training hard at the training grounds. Go meet her.

name: Imprints of Wings
description: There is a perfect bird-watching spot in the Academy only Sigrika knows...

name: Essence of Tranquility
description: Sigrika seems to be in low spirits. Go talk to her.

name: The Happiness Spell
description: As the Celebration comes to an end, Sigrika is waiting for you. She wants to "freeze" this moment of excitement in a photo, and you're an indispensable part of it.

name: Waffle Therapy
description: Luuk Herssen tries out a new waffle recipe. Head to the infirmary and enjoy a relaxing afternoon tea with him.

name: Snack Deficit Syndrome
description: Luuk Herssen tweaks the recipe again, but his freshly baked waffles have gone missing. Head to the infirmary and investigate the "case."

name: Immunodeficiency of Snacks
description: The cat suspected of stealing Luuk's waffles has been temporarily taken into his care. Head to the infirmary and visit it.

name: A Fluffy Prescription
description: While everyone was busy, the cat managed to escape. Head to the vicinity of the infirmary and catch it again!

name: The Heartbeat of Life
description: Luuk Herssen sends you a WavesLine message. He wants to meet and tell you how the cat has been doing lately.

name: Fracture the Frozen Mirror
description: You encounter an unusual robot who seems to hold a rather unique view of the truth behind this world...

name: Starlights from Yesterdays
description: Some progress has been made in activating the Exostrider...
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Smartprint Cube Reboot - Frostlands Surface
description: Complete all Smartprint Cube Reboot challenges on the Frostlands Surface

name: Unfrozen Hope
description: Hope is not found in spring, but in deep winter, when life first begins to sprout.

name: Wishes in the Bell
description: Voidmatter concentration in Lahai-Roi is intensifying. Before assigning Hiyuki her next mission, Lucilla hoped Hiyuki would take a trip back to Honami... But once there, Hiyuki met...
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: Possessions of the past.
description: Return to the Ginnungamere cabin

name: Endstate Matrix
description: I.R.I.S. at Startorch Academy wants to see you. Go check on her.

name: Knights of the Wild
description: Scattered across Lahai-Roi, the Mechscouts provide shelter to people in danger and are hailed as the Knights of the Wild. Yet now, even these guardians need your help.

name: Soar to the Beat
description: In the Mind Dive Arcade, Stellar Orbit Beats is ready for your challenge. When the beats ignite, the tracks unfold and notes spiral into star charts across the screen. Don't hesitate—your companions are ready. Jump in and race along the rhythm!

name: Broken Dimmr Heart
description: You receive an anonymous message informing you that Lenie, a member of the Survey Team, is in grave danger within the Twilight Woodlands. After rescuing Lenie, you discover Helios's prototype, a machine thought lost long ago in a Void Storm. As you investigate the prototype in this contaminated area, the freak accident that occurred during an experiment on the prototype slowly comes to light.

name: Lahai-Roi Blocks
description: Outside the Mind Dive Arcade, a student named Tetoris beckons you to try the latest "Game of the Year," Lahai-Roi Blocks. The game has many wondrous properties, or so she claims...

name: Hidden Quest
description: Hidden Quest

name: Ashinohara's Legendary Miko
description: Platya calls and asks to meet you at Rabelle College. It seems she has something she wants to discuss…

name: Special Response Force
description: After hearing that the "Lady Miko" might have ties to the Special Response Force, she asks you to consult I.R.I.S. while she continues to gather intel around campus.

name: The Rescued Researcher
description: Rumor has it, a few expedition researchers owe their lives to a mysterious "Lady Miko." Platya passes you the coordinates of one camp, and you head there to see what clues might be waiting.

name: The Film-Loving Ghost Miko
description: You catch wind of a “Film-Loving Ghost Miko” urban legend in the Academy's group chat. You decide to head to the screening room to check it out.

name: A Soliskin and Its Mysterious Friend
description: A Soliskin has made a mysterious new friend. Platya suspects it might be the "Lady Miko" herself, and since the Soliskin trusts you, she asks you to follow it and find out if her hunch is right...

name: A Miko's Preferences
description: It seems the "Lady Miko" is intentionally keeping her distance, and Platya starts to notice. But even if they never meet, she still wants to give her a gift. You can think of one person who might have an idea where this "Lady Miko's" preferences lie...

name: Platya's Gift
description: With Platya's gift finally finished, you think of the one person in contact with the "Lady Miko," Lucilla. You decide to ask her to deliver it on Platya's behalf.

name: Where to Watch the Fireworks Show?
description: In the Academy, you come across a student who seems to be having trouble with a TARD-E Unit…

name: Soar to the Beat
description: In the Mind Dive Arcade, Stellar Orbit Beats is ready for your challenge. When the beats ignite, the tracks unfold and notes spiral into star charts across the screen. Don't hesitate—your companions are ready. Jump in and race along the rhythm!

name: Soar to the Beat
description: In the Mind Dive Arcade, Stellar Orbit Beats is ready for your challenge. When the beats ignite, the tracks unfold and notes spiral into star charts across the screen. Don't hesitate—your companions are ready. Jump in and race along the rhythm!

name: Cat-Finding Master
description: A Huanglong student has brought his beloved cat to the Academy. However, it seems the cat loves playing hide-and-seek. Today, it's starting a new round…

name: Sunny Season
description: Now that Denia's gone missing, Arman invites you to discuss something about her at the Research Institute.

name: Speed up! F.U.E.L. Instrumentality Project!
description: At this year's Club Show & Tell, Van Tassie of the Psychological Threshold Alternative Therapy Society proudly unveils his latest project: the "F.U.E.L. Optimization Simulator," and he also sends you a test invitation—

name: A Snowbound Order from Cobalt Blue
description: A vague order of unknown origin keeps appearing in the ordering system again and again. It feels as though someone on the other end is waiting for a response or perhaps it's only a belated echo. As the season of the melting snowline returns, will you trace the origin of this order and discover where it truly belongs?

name: Graduation Trip
description: President Lucilla introduces you to a student named Grahame. She tasks you with joining him on a "graduation trip" to the Dimmr Plains...

name: Soar to the Beat
description: In the Mind Dive Arcade, Stellar Orbit Beats is ready for your challenge. When the beats ignite, the tracks unfold and notes spiral into star charts across the screen. Don't hesitate—your companions are ready. Jump in and race along the rhythm!

name: Hidden quest
description: Hidden quest

name: Into the Land of Paradox!
description: Startorch Academy and the Roya Tribe have joined forces to establish a foothold on the Dimmr Plains, launching a joint scientific expedition into this long-isolated realm. A message from I.R.I.S. invites you to join the inaugural expedition...

name: Tomorrow Is As Far As the Shimmer
description: Linnea the Shepherdess has drafted her plans for the future and wishes to seek advice from someone of great wisdom. She has invited you to...

name: Survey: Solisia Landing!
description: Collect and deliver Type-Q Restoratives to progress the Voidbane Eldertree Restoration in Solisia Landing.

name: Survey: Sealed Fissure!
description: Collect and deliver Type-S Restoratives to progress the Voidbane Eldertree Restoration in the Sealed Fissure.

name: Survey: Silent Crag!
description: Collect and deliver Type-F Restoratives to progress the Voidbane Eldertree Restoration in the Silent Crag.

name: Survey: Dimmr Deep!
description: Collect and deliver Type-T Restoratives to progress the Voidbane Eldertree Restoration in the Dimmr Deep.

name: Restoration: Solisia Landing!
description: The Voidcreeps in the Solisia Landing Survey Site has yet to be cleared. Soliskin Barton seems to have an idea of what to do.

name: Restoration: Sealed Fissure!
description: The Sealed Fissure shows few signs of Voidmatter contamination, but a disoriented Soliskin, Bada, is trapped in the ice and in desperate need of rescue.

name: Restoration: Silent Crag!
description: Rampaging Exoswarm are closing in on the research station. Help Professor Maeve find her missing student, Finella, and Soliskin Budee.

name: Restoration: Dimmr Deep!
description: The surveying of the Dimmr Deep is at a critical juncture. Help the researchers recover their Geospider S4, which Soliskin Banana has taken for a joyride.

name: Etched in the Heart
description: You've found some peculiar statues in the Dimmr Plains. They seem to be guarding a hidden secret...

name: Star Bouncing
description: Recently, a mysterious new game in Startorch Academy's arcade has been a hit with students. You can't help but see what the fuss is about...

name: Roaming Till the End
description: The Star Bouncing game has come to an end. It's time to meet the person behind its creation..

name: Find Me the TARD-Es
description: You encounter an anxious researcher who is searching for a batch of lost TARD-Es  in the Dimmr Plains...

name: Broken Dimmr Heart: Finale
description: After resolving the crisis with the prototype in the Twilight Woodlands, you head to the Spacetrek Collective's Research Institute at the request of an anonymous message.

name: The Memory of Your Eyes
description: A researcher in charge of supplies is in trouble and needs help.

name: Soar to the Beat
description: In the Mind Dive Arcade, Stellar Orbit Beats is ready for your challenge. When the beats ignite, the tracks unfold and notes spiral into star charts across the screen. Don't hesitate—your companions are ready. Jump in and race along the rhythm!

name: Soar to the Beat
description: In the Mind Dive Arcade, Stellar Orbit Beats is ready for your challenge. When the beats ignite, the tracks unfold and notes spiral into star charts across the screen. Don't hesitate—your companions are ready. Jump in and race along the rhythm!

name: A Zephyr-Kissed Journey to You
description: Aemeath appears to be waiting for you. You should go see her.

name: Wishes in the Bell: Epilogue
description: With the events of Lahai-Roi over... Hiyuki returns to Honami. After all, she must complete the final Purge.
chapterName: To the Stars Yet to Shine

name: So as the Melting Snow Desires
description: You receive word from Lucilla requesting your presence at the Academic Affairs office to discuss plans. In place of the busy President, Hiyuki will be meeting with you.

name: Dimmr Sightlines
description: To complete a special school project, Zenus entered the Dimmr Plains alone...

name: Sol et Arbor
description: As the Lumen Initiative progresses, the Voidbane Eldertrees have returned to normal, and the Soliskin seem to have taken an interest in them as well...

name: Spacetrek Incubation Program
description: A man named Ham has invited you to participate in the Spacetrek Incubation Program...

name: Sound of Voidmatter
description: "Two days ago, Pierce heard the voice of his late friend coming from his FCR... Pierce wants to know, once and for all, whether the voice was merely his hallucination...

name: Message Stranded in Shimmer
description: Reynard, a student of the Department of Voidmatters, is stranded in a tree atop a cliff and is desperately awaiting rescue...

name: Aced! Combat Mastery Test!
description: Standard tests make your eyes glaze over, but a test of combat skills sends your adrenaline into overdrive. So bring your A-game and step into the clash for Instructor B.1.N.G.O.'s Combat Mastery Test!

name: Depths of Illusive Realm: Chromatic Fantasy
